## User

You're working in my homelab monorepo (Rust workspace) on my Arch Linux workstation "rafael". 
I run local LLMs via llama.cpp's llama-server, currently as a single systemd service. I want to 
move to a setup where I can lazily load and hot-swap between several models on demand, and have 
things like my chat interface populate a dropdown of available models.

BEFORE WRITING ANY CODE: read these first and report back a short plan + the tradeoffs you see, 
then wait for my confirmation:
- infra/systemd/ (especially llama-server.service, rafael-chat.service, README.md)
- services/chat/ (config.rs, model.rs, server.rs, store.rs, config.json) — this is the chat backend
- the current llama-server invocation / config I'm using

HARDWARE CONSTRAINTS (these are hard requirements, design around them):
- RTX 4080, 16GB VRAM. ~55GB system RAM. Ryzen 7 5800X (16 threads).
- Only ONE heavy model can be resident at a time. The big models are MoE and use --n-cpu-moe to 
  offload experts to system RAM, so VRAM + RAM are both in play. Loading a second heavy model 
  before unloading the first must be impossible by design.
- So: lazy load on first request, unload after an idle timeout, swap = unload current then load next.

RECOMMENDED APPROACH:
- Use llama-swap as a proxy in front of llama-server. systemd supervises ONE long-running service 
  (the llama-swap proxy); llama-swap owns per-model lifecycle: lazy load, idle TTL unload, and 
  swap-on-demand keyed off the requested model name. Its /v1/models endpoint becomes the source of 
  truth for the chat dropdown.
- Alternative to mention: systemd template units (llama@.service) per model with Conflicts= for 
  mutual exclusion + socket activation. More "systemd-native" but you have to build idle-unload and 
  the model-enumeration endpoint yourself. Recommend llama-swap unless I say otherwise.

WHAT TO BUILD (after I confirm the plan):
1. A llama-swap config (YAML) defining my models, each with its full llama-server command. Seed it 
   with these three, make adding more a one-block edit, and document each flag:
   - qwen3-coder: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (MoE, daily coding + agentic). 
     llama-server -hf unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-GGUF:Q4_K_M -ngl 999 --n-cpu-moe 24 -c 65536 -fa on 
     -ctk q8_0 -ctv q8_0 --jinja --port <assigned>
     (leave --n-cpu-moe as a clearly-marked TODO I'll tune with llama-bench)
   - gpt-oss: GPT-OSS-20B (research / reasoning / reliability).
     llama-server -hf ggml-org/gpt-oss-20b-GGUF --n-cpu-moe 12 -c 32768 --jinja --port <assigned>
   - qwen-coder-fim: Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct Q4_K_M, kept for fill-in-the-middle autocomplete.
   Set a sensible idle TTL (e.g. 5–10 min) so VRAM frees up when I walk away. Ensure only one heavy 
   model loads at a time (llama-swap "groups"/swap behavior — verify the config actually enforces

server binary exists at `~/src/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server`.\n- CUDA is available under `/opt/cuda`.\n- The model endpoint is reachable at `http://rafael:8080/v1`.\n\n## llama-server.service\n\nThe checked-in unit defaults to:\n\n```ini\nLLAMA_MODEL=Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M\nLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0\nLLAMA_PORT=8080\nLLAMA_CTX=16384\nLLAMA_GPU_LAYERS=999\nLLAMA_INSTALL_DIR=%h/src/llama.cpp\n```\n\n`services/coding` uses the same default model settings:\n\n```txt\nRAFAEL_MODEL_BASE_URL=http://rafael:8080/v1\nRAFAEL_MODEL_NAME=Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M\n```\n\n## Install or Update\n\nInstall the unit into the user systemd directory:\n\n```bash\nmkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user\ncp infra/systemd/llama-server.service ~/.config/systemd/user/llama-server.service\nsystemctl --user daemon-reload\nsystemctl --user enable --now llama-server\n```\n\nAfter changing the checked-in unit, copy it again and restart:\n\n```bash\ncp infra/systemd/llama-server.service ~/.config/systemd/user/llama-server.service\nsystemctl --user daemon-reload\nsystemctl --user restart llama-server\n```\n\n## Local Overrides\n\nKeep machine-specific tweaks out of the tracked unit by using a systemd drop-in:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user edit llama-server\n```\n\nExample override:\n\n```ini\n[Service]\nEnvironment=LLAMA_MODEL=bartowski/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M\nEnvironment=LLAMA_HOST=127.0.0.1\nEnvironment=LLAMA_PORT=8080\nEnvironment=LLAMA_CTX=8192\nEnvironment=LLAMA_GPU_LAYERS=999\nEnvironment=LLAMA_INSTALL_DIR=%h/src/llama.cpp\n```\n\nReload and restart after editing:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user daemon-reload\nsystemctl --user restart llama-server\n```\n\n## Operations\n\nCheck whether the unit is running:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user status llama-server\n```\n\nFollow logs:\n\n```bash\njournalctl --user -u llama-server -f\n```\n\nConfirm the OpenAI-compatible API is answering:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/models\n```\n\nIf the service fails immediately, check that `~/src/llama.cpp` exists, that the\nserver binary has been built, and that the CUDA paths in the unit match the\nmachine.\n\n## rafael-chat.service\n\nThe checked-in unit serves the chat UI and API from this repo:\n\n```ini\nRAFAEL_CHAT_BIND=0.0.0.0:3031\nRAFAEL_CHAT_DATA_DIR=%h/rafael/data/chat\nRAFAEL_CHAT_WEB_DIST=%h/rafael/services/chat/web/dist\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL=http://rafael:8080/v1\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_NAME=Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=300\n```\n\nBuild the frontend and release binary before starting the unit:\n\n```bash\ncd ~/rafael/services/chat/web\nnpm run build\n\ncd ~/rafael\ncargo build --release -p chat\n```\n\nInstall the unit into the user systemd directory:\n\n```bash\nmkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user\ncp infra/systemd/rafael-chat.service ~/.config/systemd/user/rafael-chat.service\nsystemctl --user daemon-reload\nsystemctl --user enable --now rafael-chat\n```\n\nAfter changing the checked-in unit, copy it again and restart:\n\n```bash\ncp infra/systemd/rafael-chat.service ~/.config/systemd/user/rafael-chat.service\nsystemctl --user daemon-reload\nsystemctl --user restart rafael-chat\n```\n\nKeep it running after logout or reboot:\n\n```bash\nsudo loginctl enable-linger \"$USER\"\n```\n\nUse a drop-in for machine-specific overrides:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user edit rafael-chat\n```\n\nExample ## Assistant

The checked-in llama unit is a direct `llama-server` on port 8080 with Qwen2.5-Coder 14B and no lifecycle management. The chat unit is hard-wired to that endpoint and a single model name, so the model-selection change will need a small backend/API/frontend adjustment after the proxy is in place.Next I’m reading the chat config/model/server/store code path to see whether model identity is persisted per message/conversation and how requests are forwarded. That will determine whether the dropdown is just UI state or needs storage changes.

    }

  "source": "unified_exec_startup",
  "stdout": "use std::{convert::Infallible, sync::Arc};\n\nuse axum::{\n    Json, Router,\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::StatusCode,\n    response::{\n        IntoResponse, Response,\n        sse::{Event, KeepAlive, Sse},\n    },\n    routing::{get, patch, post},\n};\nuse chrono::Utc;\nuse common::{SafeComponent, slugify};\nuse serde::Serialize;\nuse tokio::{\n    net::TcpListener,\n    sync::{Mutex, mpsc},\n};\nuse tokio_stream::{StreamExt, wrappers::UnboundedReceiverStream};\nuse tower_http::services::{ServeDir, ServeFile};\nuse tracing::{info, warn};\n\nuse crate::{\n    config::AppConfig,\n    model,\n    store::{ChatStore, clean_optional, new_id},\n    types::{\n        ChatConfigFile, ChatMessageRecord, ChatRole, ChatStateResponse, Conversation,\n        CreateConversationRequest, PublicProvider, SaveProviderRequest, SendMessageRequest,\n        StoredProvider, UpdateConversationRequest, UpdateSettingsRequest,\n    },\n};\n\n#[derive(Clone)]\nstruct ServerState {\n    config: AppConfig,\n    store: ChatStore,\n    writes: Arc<Mutex<()>>,\n}\n\npub async fn serve(config: AppConfig) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let store = ChatStore::new(config.data_dir.clone());\n    let state = ServerState {\n        config: config.clone(),\n        store,\n        writes: Arc::new(Mutex::new(())),\n    };\n\n    state\n        .store\n        .load_or_initialize_config(&state.config.default_provider)\n        .await?;\n\n    let api = Router::new()\n        .route(\"/state\", get(get_state))\n        .route(\"/providers\", post(save_provider))\n        .route(\"/settings\", patch(update_settings))\n        .route(\n            \"/conversations\",\n            get(list_conversations).post(create_conversation),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/conversations/{id}\",\n            get(get_conversation)\n                .patch(update_conversation)\n                .delete(delete_conversation),\n        )\n        .route(\"/conversations/{id}/messages\", post(send_message))\n        .route(\"/conversations/{id}/messages/stream\", post(stream_message))\n        .with_state(state);\n\n    let static_files = ServeDir::new(config.web_dist.clone())\n        .not_found_service(ServeFile::new(config.web_dist.join(\"index.html\")));\n    let app = Router::new()\n        .nest(\"/api\", api)\n        .fallback_service(static_files);\n    let listener = TcpListener::bind(config.bind).await?;\n\n    info!(\n        bind = %config.bind,\n        data_dir = %config.data_dir.display(),\n        web_dist = %config.web_dist.display(),\n        \"chat server listening\"\n    );\n\n    axum::serve(listener, app)\n        .with_graceful_shutdown(shutdown_signal())\n        .await?;\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn get_state(State(state): State<ServerState>) -> Result<Json<ChatStateResponse>, ApiError> {\n    let config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let conversations = state.store.list_conversations().await?;\n    Ok(Json(ChatStateResponse {\n        providers: config\n            .providers\n            .iter()\n            .map(PublicProvider::from_stored)\n            .collect(),\n        active_provider_id: config.settings.active_provider_id,\n        theme: config.settings.theme,\n        conversations,\n    }))\n}\n\nasync fn list_conversations(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Vec<crate::types::ConversationSummary>>, ApiError> {\n    Ok(Json(state.store.list_conversations().await?))\n}\n\nasync fn create_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<CreateConversationRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    Ok(Json(state.store.create_conversation(request.title).await?))\n}\n\nasync fn get_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn update_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<UpdateConversationRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n\n    if let Some(pinned) = request.pinned {\n        conversation.pinned = pinned;\n        conversation.updated_at = Utc::now();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn delete_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    if state.store.delete_conversation(&id).await? {\n        Ok(StatusCode::NO_CONTENT.into_response())\n    } else {\n        Err(ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))\n    }\n}\n\nasync fn send_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let provider_id = request\n        .provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&config.settings.active_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::bad_request(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?;\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        return Err(ApiError::bad_request(\n            \"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    let response =\n        match model::complete_chat(provider, &conversation.messages, state.config.model_timeout)\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) => response,\n            Err(err) => {\n                warn!(provider_id = %provider.id, error = %err, \"model request failed\");\n                return Err(ApiError::bad_gateway(\"model endpoint returned an error\"));\n            }\n        };\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: response,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Sse<impl tokio_stream::Stream<Item = Result<Event, Infallible>>>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let provider_id = request.provider_id;\n    let (tx, rx) = mpsc::unbounded_channel();\n\n    tokio::spawn(async move {\n        if let Err(err) = stream_message_worker(state, id, content, provider_id, tx.clone()).await {\n            warn!(error = %err, \"streaming message failed\");\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Error {\n                error: \"model endpoint returned an error\".to_owned(),\n            });\n        }\n    });\n\n    let stream = UnboundedReceiverStream::new(rx).map(|message| Ok(stream_event(message)));\n    Ok(Sse::new(stream).keep_alive(KeepAlive::default()))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message_worker(\n    state: ServerState,\n    id: String,\n    content: String,\n    requested_provider_id: Option<String>,\n    tx: mpsc::UnboundedSender<ChatStreamEvent>,\n) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state\n        .store\n        .load_or_initialize_config(&state.config.default_provider)\n        .await?;\n    let provider_id = requested_provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&config.settings.active_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?\n        .clone();\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        anyhow::bail!(\"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\");\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation {\n        conversation: conversation.clone(),\n    });\n\n    let assistant_content = model::stream_chat(\n        &provider,\n        &conversation.messages,\n        state.config.model_timeout,\n        |delta| {\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Delta {\n                content: delta.to_owned(),\n            });\n        },\n    )\n    .await?;\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: assistant_content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation { conversation });\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Done);\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn save_provider(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<SaveProviderRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<PublicProvider>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let provider = normalize_provider(request, &config)?;\n    let public = PublicProvider::from_stored(&provider);\n\n    match config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .position(|existing| existing.id == provider.id)\n    {\n        Some(index) => config.providers[index] = provider,\n        None => config.providers.push(provider),\n    }\n\n    if !config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)\n    {\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = public.id.clone();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_config(&config).await?;\n    Ok(Json(public))\n}\n\nasync fn update_settings(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<UpdateSettingsRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<ChatStateResponse>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut config = state.chat_config().await?;\n\n    if let Some(active_provider_id) = request\n        .active_provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n    {\n        SafeComponent::parse(active_provider_id.to_owned())\n            .map_err(|_| ApiError::bad_request(\"active provider id is invalid\"))?;\n        if !config\n            .providers\n            .iter()\n            .any(|provider| provider.id == active_provider_id)\n        {\n            return Err(ApiError::bad_request(\"active provider does not exist\"));\n        }\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = active_provider_id.to_owned();\n    }\n\n    if let Some(theme) = request.theme {\n        config.settings.theme = theme;\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_config(&config).await?;\n    let conversations = state.store.list_conversations().await?;\n    Ok(Json(ChatStateResponse {\n        providers: config\n            .providers\n            .iter()\n            .map(PublicProvider::from_stored)\n            .collect(),\n        active_provider_id: config.settings.active_provider_id,\n        theme: config.settings.theme,\n        conversations,\n    }))\n}\n\nimpl ServerState {\n    async fn chat_config(&self) -> Result<ChatConfigFile, ApiError> {\n        Ok(self\n            .store\n            .load_or_initialize_config(&self.config.default_provider)\n            .await?)\n    }\n}\n\nfn normalize_provider(\n    request: SaveProviderRequest,\n    config: &ChatConfigFile,\n) -> Result<StoredProvider, ApiError> {\n    let name = clean_required(request.name, \"provider name\")?;\n    let base_url = clean_required(request.base_url, \"provider base URL\")?;\n",

  "aggregated_output": "use std::{convert::Infallible, sync::Arc};\n\nuse axum::{\n    Json, Router,\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::StatusCode,\n    response::{\n        IntoResponse, Response,\n        sse::{Event, KeepAlive, Sse},\n    },\n    routing::{get, patch, post},\n};\nuse chrono::Utc;\nuse common::{SafeComponent, slugify};\nuse serde::Serialize;\nuse tokio::{\n    net::TcpListener,\n    sync::{Mutex, mpsc},\n};\nuse tokio_stream::{StreamExt, wrappers::UnboundedReceiverStream};\nuse tower_http::services::{ServeDir, ServeFile};\nuse tracing::{info, warn};\n\nuse crate::{\n    config::AppConfig,\n    model,\n    store::{ChatStore, clean_optional, new_id},\n    types::{\n        ChatConfigFile, ChatMessageRecord, ChatRole, ChatStateResponse, Conversation,\n        CreateConversationRequest, PublicProvider, SaveProviderRequest, SendMessageRequest,\n        StoredProvider, UpdateConversationRequest, UpdateSettingsRequest,\n    },\n};\n\n#[derive(Clone)]\nstruct ServerState {\n    config: AppConfig,\n    store: ChatStore,\n    writes: Arc<Mutex<()>>,\n}\n\npub async fn serve(config: AppConfig) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let store = ChatStore::new(config.data_dir.clone());\n    let state = ServerState {\n        config: config.clone(),\n        store,\n        writes: Arc::new(Mutex::new(())),\n    };\n\n    state\n        .store\n        .load_or_initialize_config(&state.config.default_provider)\n        .await?;\n\n    let api = Router::new()\n        .route(\"/state\", get(get_state))\n        .route(\"/providers\", post(save_provider))\n        .route(\"/settings\", patch(update_settings))\n        .route(\n            \"/conversations\",\n            get(list_conversations).post(create_conversation),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/conversations/{id}\",\n            get(get_conversation)\n                .patch(update_conversation)\n                .delete(delete_conversation),\n        )\n        .route(\"/conversations/{id}/messages\", post(send_message))\n        .route(\"/conversations/{id}/messages/stream\", post(stream_message))\n        .with_state(state);\n\n    let static_files = ServeDir::new(config.web_dist.clone())\n        .not_found_service(ServeFile::new(config.web_dist.join(\"index.html\")));\n    let app = Router::new()\n        .nest(\"/api\", api)\n        .fallback_service(static_files);\n    let listener = TcpListener::bind(config.bind).await?;\n\n    info!(\n        bind = %config.bind,\n        data_dir = %config.data_dir.display(),\n        web_dist = %config.web_dist.display(),\n        \"chat server listening\"\n    );\n\n    axum::serve(listener, app)\n        .with_graceful_shutdown(shutdown_signal())\n        .await?;\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn get_state(State(state): State<ServerState>) -> Result<Json<ChatStateResponse>, ApiError> {\n    let config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let conversations = state.store.list_conversations().await?;\n    Ok(Json(ChatStateResponse {\n        providers: config\n            .providers\n            .iter()\n            .map(PublicProvider::from_stored)\n            .collect(),\n        active_provider_id: config.settings.active_provider_id,\n        theme: config.settings.theme,\n        conversations,\n    }))\n}\n\nasync fn list_conversations(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Vec<crate::types::ConversationSummary>>, ApiError> {\n    Ok(Json(state.store.list_conversations().await?))\n}\n\nasync fn create_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<CreateConversationRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    Ok(Json(state.store.create_conversation(request.title).await?))\n}\n\nasync fn get_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn update_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<UpdateConversationRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n\n    if let Some(pinned) = request.pinned {\n        conversation.pinned = pinned;\n        conversation.updated_at = Utc::now();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn delete_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    if .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n\n    if let Some(pinned) = request.pinned {\n        conversation.pinned = pinned;\n        conversation.updated_at = Utc::now();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn delete_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    if state.store.delete_conversation(&id).await? {\n        Ok(StatusCode::NO_CONTENT.into_response())\n    } else {\n        Err(ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))\n    }\n}\n\nasync fn send_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let provider_id = request\n        .provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&config.settings.active_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::bad_request(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?;\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        return Err(ApiError::bad_request(\n            \"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    let response =\n        match model::complete_chat(provider, &conversation.messages, state.config.model_timeout)\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) => response,\n            Err(err) => {\n                warn!(provider_id = %provider.id, error = %err, \"model request failed\");\n                return Err(ApiError::bad_gateway(\"model endpoint returned an error\"));\n            }\n        };\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: response,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Sse<impl tokio_stream::Stream<Item = Result<Event, Infallible>>>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let provider_id = request.provider_id;\n    let (tx, rx) = mpsc::unbounded_channel();\n\n    tokio::spawn(async move {\n        if let Err(err) = stream_message_worker(state, id, content, provider_id, tx.clone()).await {\n            warn!(error = %err, \"streaming message failed\");\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Error {\n                error: \"model endpoint returned an error\".to_owned(),\n            });\n        }\n    });\n\n    let stream = UnboundedReceiverStream::new(rx).map(|message| Ok(stream_event(message)));\n    Ok(Sse::new(stream).keep_alive(KeepAlive::default()))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message_worker(\n    state: ServerState,\n    id: String,\n    content: String,\n    requested_provider_id: Option<String>,\n    tx: mpsc::UnboundedSender<ChatStreamEvent>,\n) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state\n        .store\n        .load_or_initialize_config(&state.config.default_provider)\n        .await?;\n    let provider_id = requested_provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&config.settings.active_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?\n        .clone();\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        anyhow::bail!(\"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\");\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation {\n        conversation: conversation.clone(),\n    });\n\n    let assistant_content = model::stream_chat(\n        &provider,\n        &conversation.messages,\n        state.config.model_timeout,\n        |delta| {\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Delta {\n                content: delta.to_owned(),\n            });\n        },\n    )\n    .await?;\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: assistant_content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation { conversation });\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Done);\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn save_provider(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<SaveProviderRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<PublicProvider>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let provider = normalize_provider(request, &config)?;\n    let public = PublicProvider::from_stored(&provider);\n\n    match config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .position(|existing| existing.id == provider.id)\n    {\n        Some(index) => config.providers[index] = provider,\n        None => config.providers.push(provider),\n    }\n\n    if !config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)\n    {\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = public.id.clone();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_config(&config).await?;\n    Ok(Json(public))\n}\n\nasync fn update_settings(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<UpdateSettingsRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<ChatStateResponse>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut config = state.chat_config().await?;\n\n    if let Some(active_provider_id) = request\n        .active_provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n    {\n        SafeComponent::parse(active_provider_id.to_owned())\n            .map_err(|_| ApiError::bad_request(\"active provider id is invalid\"))?;\n        if !config\n            .providers\n            .iter()\n            .any(|provider| provider.id == active_provider_id)\n        {\n            return Err(ApiError::bad_request(\"active provider does not exist\"));\n        }\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = active_provider_id.to_owned();\n    }\n\n    if let Some(theme) = request.theme {\n        config.settings.theme = theme;\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_config(&config).await?;\n    let conversations = state.store.list_conversations().await?;\n    Ok(Json(ChatStateResponse {\n        providers: config\n            .providers\n            .iter()\n            .map(PublicProvider::from_stored)\n            .collect(),\n        active_provider_id: config.settings.active_provider_id,\n        theme: config.settings.theme,\n        conversations,\n    }))\n}\n\nimpl ServerState {\n    async fn chat_config(&self) -> Result<ChatConfigFile, ApiError> {\n        Ok(self\n            .store\n            .load_or_initialize_config(&self.config.default_provider)\n            .await?)\n    }\n}\n\nfn normalize_provider(\n    request: SaveProviderRequest,\n    config: &ChatConfigFile,\n) -> Result<StoredProvider, ApiError> {\n    let name = clean_required(request.name, \"provider name\")?;\n    let base_url = clean_required(request.base_url, \"provider base URL\")?;\n",

.context(\"model endpoint returned an error\")?;\n\n    Ok(response.content)\n}\n\nasync fn openai_compatible_stream_chat<F>(\n    provider: &StoredProvider,\n    messages: &[ChatMessageRecord],\n Duration,\n}\n\nimpl AppConfig {\n    pub fn from_env() -> anyhow::Result<Self> {\n        let env = EnvConfig::from_current_env();\n        let reader = env.reader();\n        let repo_root = repo_root()?;\n        let service_root = PathBuf::from(env!(\"CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR\"));\n\n        let model_timeout_seconds = reader\n            .parse_or(\"RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS\", 300_u64)\n            .context(\"failed to parse RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS\")?;\n\n        Ok(Self {\n            bind: reader\n                .parse_or(\"RAFAEL_CHAT_BIND\", common::SafeComponent;\nuse serde::{Serialize, de::DeserializeOwned};\nuse tokio::io::AsyncWriteExt;\n\nuse crate::types::{\n    ChatConfigFile, ChatSettings, Conversation, ConversationSummary, StoredProvider, ThemeName,\n};\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ChatStore {\n    data_dir: PathBuf,\n    config_path: PathBuf,\n    conversations_dir: PathBuf,\n}\n\nimpl ChatStore {\n    pub fn new(data_dir: impl Into<PathBuf>) -> Self {\n        let data_dir = data_dir.into();\n        Self {\n            config_path: data_dir.join(\"config.json\"),\n            conversations_dir: data_dir.join(\"conversations\"),\n            data_dir,\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub async fn load_or_initialize_config(\n        &self,\n        default_provider: &StoredProvider,\n    ) -> anyhow::Result<ChatConfigFile> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        match read_json::<ChatConfigFile>(&self.config_path).await {\n            Ok(config) => {\n                let (repaired, changed) = repair_config(config, default_provider);\n                if changed {\n                    self.save_config(&repaired).await?;\n                }\n                Ok(repaired)\n            }\n            Err(err) if is_not_found(&err) => {\n                let config = ChatConfigFile {\n                    providers: vec![default_provider.clone()],\n                    settings: ChatSettings {\n                        active_provider_id: default_provider.id.clone(),\n                        theme: ThemeName::Charcoal,\n                    },\n                };\n                self.save_config(&config).await?;\n                Ok(config)\n            }\n            Err(err) => Err(err),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub async fn save_config(&self, config: &ChatConfigFile) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        write_json(&self.config_path, config).await\n    }\n\n    pub async fn list_conversations(&self) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<ConversationSummary>> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        let mut summaries = Vec::new();\n        let mut entries = tokio::fs::read_dir(&self.conversations_dir)\n            .await\n            .with_context(|| {\n                format!(\n                    \"failed to read conversations directory {}\",\n                    self.conversations_dir.display()\n                )\n            })?;\n\n        while let Some(entry) = entries\n            .next_entry()\n            .await\n            .context(\"failed to read directory entry\")?\n        {\n            let path = entry.path();\n            if path.extension().and_then(|value| value.to_str()) != Some(\"json\") {\n                continue;\n            }\n            if !entry\n                .file_type()\n                .await\n                .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to read file type for {}\", path.display()))?\n                .is_file()\n            {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            let conversation = read_json::<Conversation>(&path).await?;\n            summaries.push(ConversationSummary::from_conversation(&conversation));\n        }\n\n        summaries.sort_by(|left, right| {\n            right\n                .pinned\n                .cmp(&left.pinned)\n                .then_with(|| right.updated_at.cmp(&left.updated_at))\n        });\n        Ok(summaries)\n    }\n\n    pub async fn create_conversation(&self, title: Option<String>) -> anyhow::Result<Conversation> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        let now = Utc::now();\n        let conversation = Conversation {\n            id: new_id(\"conv\"),\n            title: clean_optional(title).unwrap_or_else(|| \"New conversation\".to_owned()),\n            pinned: false,\n            created_at: now,\n            updated_at: now,\n            messages: Vec::new(),\n        };\n        self.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n        Ok(conversation)\n    }\n\n    pub async fn get_conversation(&self, id: &str) -> anyhow::Result<Option<Conversation>> {\n        let path = self.conversation_path(id)?;\n        match read_json::<Conversation>(&path).await {\n            Ok(conversation) => Ok(Some(conversation)),\n            Err(err) if is_not_found(&err) => Ok(None),\n            Err(err) => Err(err),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub async fn save_conversation(&self, conversation: &Conversation) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        let path = self.conversation_path(&conversation.id)?;\n        write_json(&path, conversation).await\n    }\n\n    pub async fn delete_conversation(&self, id: &str) -> anyhow::Result<bool> {\n        let path = self.conversation_path(id)?;\n        match tokio::fs::remove_file(&path).await {\n            Ok(()) => Ok(true),\n            Err(source) if source.kind() == std::io::ErrorKind::NotFound => Ok(false),\n            Err(source) => Err(source)\n                .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to delete conversation file {}\", path.display())),\n        }\n    }\n\n    fn conversation_path(&self, id: &str) -> anyhow::Result<PathBuf> {\n        let id = SafeComponent::parse(id.to_owned()).context(\"invalid conversation id\")?;\n        let path = self.conversations_dir.join(format!(\"{}.json\", id.as_str()));\n        if !path.starts_with(&self.conversations_dir) {\n            bail!(\"conversation path escaped data directory\");\n        }\n        Ok(path)\n    }\n\n    async fn ensure_dirs(&self) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n        tokio::fs::create_dir_all(&self.data_dir)\n            .await\n            .with_context(|| {\n                format!(\n                    \"failed to create data directory {}\",\n                    self.data_dir.display()\n                )\n            })?;\n        tokio::fs::create_dir_all(&self.conversations_dir)\n            .await\n            .with_context(|| {\n                format!(\n                    \"failed to create conversations directory {}\",\n                    self.conversations_dir.display()\n                )\n            })?;\n        reject_symlink(&self.data_dir).await?;\n        reject_symlink(&self.conversations_dir).await\n    }\n}\n\npub fn clean_optional(value: Option<String>) -> Option<String> {\n    value\n        .map(|value| value.trim().to_owned())\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n}\n\npub fn new_id(prefix: &str) -> String {\n    let sequence = NEXT_ID.fetch_add(1, Ordering::Relaxed);\n    let nanos = SystemTime::now()\n        .duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH)\n        .map(|duration| duration.as_nanos())\n        .unwrap_or_default();\n    format!(\"{prefix}-{nanos}-{sequence}\")\n}\n\nfn repair_config(\n    mut config: ChatConfigFile,\n    default_provider: &StoredProvider,\n) -> (ChatConfigFile, bool) {\n    let mut changed = false;\n\n    if config.providers.is_empty() {\n        config.providers.push(default_provider.clone());\n        changed = true;\n    }\n\n    if !config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)\n    {\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = config\n            .providers\n            .first()\n            .map(|provider| provider.id.clone())\n            .unwrap_or_else(|| default_provider.id.clone());\n        changed = true;\n    }\n\n    (config, changed)\n}\n\nasync fn read_json<T>(path: &Path) -> anyhow::Result<T>\nwhere\n    T: DeserializeOwned,\n{\n    reject_symlink(path).await?;\n    let bytes = tokio::fs::read(path)\n        .await\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to read json file {}\", path.display()))?;\n    serde_json::from_slice(&bytes)\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to parse json file {}\", path.display()))\n}\n\nasync fn write_json<T>(path: &Path, value: &T) -> anyhow::Result<()>\nwhere\n    T: Serialize,\n{\n    reject_symlink(path).await?;\n    let bytes = serde_json::to_vec_pretty(value)\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to serialize json file {}\", path.display()))?;\n    atomic_write(path, &bytes).await\n}\n\nasync fn atomic_write(path: &Path, bytes: &[u8]) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let tmp_path = path.with_extension(format!(\"tmp-{}-{}\", std::process::id(), new_id(\"write\")));\n    let mut file = tokio::fs::File::create(&tmp_path)\n        .await\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to create temp file {}\", tmp_path.display()))?;\n    file.write_all(bytes)\n        .await\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to write temp file {}\", tmp_path.display()))?;\n    file.flush()\n        .await\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to flush temp file {}\", tmp_path.display()))?;\n    tokio::fs::rename(&tmp_path, path).await.with_context(|| {\n        format!(\n            \"failed to replace {} with {}\",\n            path.display(),\n            tmp_path.display()\n        )\n    })?;\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn reject_symlink(path: &Path) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    match tokio::fs::symlink_metadata(path).await {\n        Ok(metadata) if metadata.file_type().is_symlink() => {\n            bail!(\"refusing to use symlink path {}\", path.display())\n        }\n        Ok(_) => Ok(()),\n        Err(source) if source.kind() == std::io::ErrorKind::NotFound => Ok(()),\n        Err(source) => {\n            Err(source).with_context(|| format!(\"failed to inspect path {}\", path.display()))\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfn is_not_found(err: &anyhow::Error) -> bool {\n    err.chain().any(|cause| {\n        cause\n            .downcast_ref::<std::io::Error>()\n            .is_some_and(|source| source.kind() == std::io::ErrorKind::NotFound)\n    })\n}\n\nstatic NEXT_ID: AtomicU64 = AtomicU64::new(0);\n",

common::SafeComponent;\nuse serde::{Serialize, de::DeserializeOwned};\nuse tokio::io::AsyncWriteExt;\n\nuse crate::types::{\n    ChatConfigFile, ChatSettings, Conversation, ConversationSummary, StoredProvider, ThemeName,\n};\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ChatStore {\n    data_dir: PathBuf,\n    config_path: PathBuf,\n    conversations_dir: PathBuf,\n}\n\nimpl ChatStore {\n    pub fn new(data_dir: impl Into<PathBuf>) -> Self {\n        let data_dir = data_dir.into();\n        Self {\n            config_path: data_dir.join(\"config.json\"),\n            conversations_dir: data_dir.join(\"conversations\"),\n            data_dir,\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub async fn load_or_initialize_config(\n        &self,\n        default_provider: &StoredProvider,\n    ) -> anyhow::Result<ChatConfigFile> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        match read_json::<ChatConfigFile>(&self.config_path).await {\n            Ok(config) => {\n                let (repaired, changed) = repair_config(config, default_provider);\n                if changed {\n                    self.save_config(&repaired).await?;\n                }\n                Ok(repaired)\n            }\n            Err(err) if is_not_found(&err) => {\n                let config = ChatConfigFile {\n                    providers: vec![default_provider.clone()],\n                    settings: ChatSettings {\n                        active_provider_id: default_provider.id.clone(),\n                        theme: ThemeName::Charcoal,\n                    },\n                };\n                self.save_config(&config).await?;\n                Ok(config)\n            }\n            Err(err) => Err(err),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub async fn save_config(&self, config: &ChatConfigFile) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        write_json(&self.config_path, config).await\n    }\n\n    pub async fn list_conversations(&self) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<ConversationSummary>> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        let mut summaries = Vec::new();\n        let mut entries = tokio::fs::read_dir(&self.conversations_dir)\n            .await\n            .with_context(|| {\n                format!(\n                    \"failed to read conversations directory {}\",\n                    self.conversations_dir.display()\n                )\n            })?;\n\n        while let Some(entry) = entries\n            .next_entry()\n            .await\n            .context(\"failed to read directory entry\")?\n        {\n            let path = entry.path();\n            if path.extension().and_then(|value| value.to_str()) != Some(\"json\") {\n                continue;\n            }\n            if !entry\n                .file_type()\n                .await\n                .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to read file type for {}\", path.display()))?\n                .is_file()\n            {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            let conversation = read_json::<Conversation>(&path).await?;\n            summaries.push(ConversationSummary::from_conversation(&conversation));\n        }\n\n        summaries.sort_by(|left, right| {\n            right\n                .pinned\n                .cmp(&left.pinned)\n                .then_with(|| right.updated_at.cmp(&left.updated_at))\n        });\n        Ok(summaries)\n    }\n\n    pub async fn create_conversation(&self, title: Option<String>) -> anyhow::Result<Conversation> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        let now = Utc::now();\n        let conversation = Conversation {\n            id: new_id(\"conv\"),\n            title: clean_optional(title).unwrap_or_else(|| \"New conversation\".to_owned()),\n            pinned: false,\n            created_at: now,\n            updated_at: now,\n            messages: Vec::new(),\n        };\n        self.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n        Ok(conversation)\n    }\n\n    pub async fn get_conversation(&self, id: &str) -> anyhow::Result<Option<Conversation>> {\n        let path = self.conversation_path(id)?;\n        match read_json::<Conversation>(&path).await {\n            Ok(conversation) => Ok(Some(conversation)),\n            Err(err) if is_not_found(&err) => Ok(None),\n            Err(err) => Err(err),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub async fn save_conversation(&self, conversation: &Conversation) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n        self.ensure_dirs().await?;\n        let path = self.conversation_path(&conversation.id)?;\n        write_json(&path, conversation).await\n    }\n\n    pub async fn delete_conversation(&self, id: &str) -> anyhow::Result<bool> {\n        let path = self.conversation_path(id)?;\n        match tokio::fs::remove_file(&path).await {\n            Ok(()) => Ok(true),\n            Err(source) if source.kind() == std::io::ErrorKind::NotFound => Ok(false),\n            Err(source) => Err(source)\n                .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to delete conversation file {}\", path.display())),\n        }\n    }\n\n    fn conversation_path(&self, id: &str) -> anyhow::Result<PathBuf> {\n        let id = SafeComponent::parse(id.to_owned()).context(\"invalid conversation id\")?;\n        let path = self.conversations_dir.join(format!(\"{}.json\", id.as_str()));\n        if !path.starts_with(&self.conversations_dir) {\n            bail!(\"conversation path escaped data directory\");\n        }\n        Ok(path)\n    }\n\n    async fn ensure_dirs(&self) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n        tokio::fs::create_dir_all(&self.data_dir)\n            .await\n            .with_context(|| {\n                format!(\n                    \"failed to create data directory {}\",\n                    self.data_dir.display()\n                )\n            })?;\n        tokio::fs::create_dir_all(&self.conversations_dir)\n            .await\n            .with_context(|| {\n                format!(\n                    \"failed to create conversations directory {}\",\n                    self.conversations_dir.display()\n                )\n            })?;\n        reject_symlink(&self.data_dir).await?;\n        reject_symlink(&self.conversations_dir).await\n    }\n}\n\npub fn clean_optional(value: Option<String>) -> Option<String> {\n    value\n        .map(|value| value.trim().to_owned())\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n}\n\npub fn new_id(prefix: &str) -> String {\n    let sequence = NEXT_ID.fetch_add(1, Ordering::Relaxed);\n    let nanos = SystemTime::now()\n        .duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH)\n        .map(|duration| duration.as_nanos())\n        .unwrap_or_default();\n    format!(\"{prefix}-{nanos}-{sequence}\")\n}\n\nfn repair_config(\n    mut config: ChatConfigFile,\n    default_provider: &StoredProvider,\n) -> (ChatConfigFile, bool) {\n    let mut changed = false;\n\n    if config.providers.is_empty() {\n        config.providers.push(default_provider.clone());\n        changed = true;\n    }\n\n    if !config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)\n    {\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = config\n            .providers\n            .first()\n            .map(|provider| provider.id.clone())\n            .unwrap_or_else(|| default_provider.id.clone());\n        changed = true;\n    }\n\n    (config, changed)\n}\n\nasync fn read_json<T>(path: &Path) -> anyhow::Result<T>\nwhere\n    T: DeserializeOwned,\n{\n    reject_symlink(path).await?;\n    let bytes = tokio::fs::read(path)\n        .await\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to read json file {}\", path.display()))?;\n    serde_json::from_slice(&bytes)\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to parse json file {}\", path.display()))\n}\n\nasync fn write_json<T>(path: &Path, value: &T) -> anyhow::Result<()>\nwhere\n    T: Serialize,\n{\n    reject_symlink(path).await?;\n    let bytes = serde_json::to_vec_pretty(value)\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to serialize json file {}\", path.display()))?;\n    atomic_write(path, &bytes).await\n}\n\nasync fn atomic_write(path: &Path, bytes: &[u8]) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let tmp_path = path.with_extension(format!(\"tmp-{}-{}\", std::process::id(), new_id(\"write\")));\n    let mut file = tokio::fs::File::create(&tmp_path)\n        .await\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to create temp file {}\", tmp_path.display()))?;\n    file.write_all(bytes)\n        .await\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to write temp file {}\", tmp_path.display()))?;\n    file.flush()\n        .await\n        .with_context(|| format!(\"failed to flush temp file {}\", tmp_path.display()))?;\n    tokio::fs::rename(&tmp_path, path).await.with_context(|| {\n        format!(\n            \"failed to replace {} with {}\",\n            path.display(),\n            tmp_path.display()\n        )\n    })?;\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn reject_symlink(path: &Path) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    match tokio::fs::symlink_metadata(path).await {\n        Ok(metadata) if metadata.file_type().is_symlink() => {\n            bail!(\"refusing to use symlink path {}\", path.display())\n        }\n        Ok(_) => Ok(()),\n        Err(source) if source.kind() == std::io::ErrorKind::NotFound => Ok(()),\n        Err(source) => {\n            Err(source).with_context(|| format!(\"failed to inspect path {}\", path.display()))\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfn is_not_found(err: &anyhow::Error) -> bool {\n    err.chain().any(|cause| {\n        cause\n            .downcast_ref::<std::io::Error>()\n            .is_some_and(|source| source.kind() == std::io::ErrorKind::NotFound)\n    })\n}\n\nstatic NEXT_ID: AtomicU64 = AtomicU64::new(0);\n",
  "status": "completed"
}
```

## Assistant

The backend already has a provider abstraction and stores assistant messages with `provider_id`; user messages are provider-neutral. The runtime config file is under `RAFAEL_CHAT_DATA_DIR/config.json` rather than `services/chat/config.json`, so I’ll treat the requested `config.json` as the generated chat data config unless you have another file in mind.I’m continuing through the backend type definitions and frontend API/UI pieces now, because the existing provider settings may already cover part of the dropdown behavior.

**Tool Call: Read api.ts**

}\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function sendMessage(\n  conversationId: string,\n  content: string,\n  providerId?: string\n): Promise<Conversation> {\n  return request<Conversation>(\n    `/api/conversations/${encodeURIComponent(conversationId)}/messages`,\n    {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { content, providerId }\n    }\n  );\n}\n\nexport interface StreamMessageHandlers {\n   method: \"POST\",\n      headers: {\n        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"\n      },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ content, providerId })\n    }\n  );\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const readSseStream(response.body, handlers);\n}\n\nexport async function saveProvider(\n  provider: SaveProviderRequest\n): Promise<PublicProvider> {\n  return request<PublicProvider>(\"/api/providers\", eventBoundary.index);\n      buffer = buffer.slice(eventBoundary.index + eventBoundary.length);\n      dispatchSseBlock(block, handlers);\n      eventBoundary = findSseBoundary(buffer);\n    }\n  }\n\n  const rest = buffer.trim();\n  if (rest !== \"\") {\n    dispatchSseBlock(rest, handlers);\n  }\n}\n\nfunction findSseBoundary(buffer: string): { index: number; length: number } | null {\n  const lf = buffer.indexOf(\"\\n\\n\");\n  const crlf = buffer.indexOf(\"\\r\\n\\r\\n\");\n\n  if (lf === -1 && crlf === -1) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  if (lf === -1) {\n    return { index: crlf, length: 4 };\n  }\n  if (crlf === -1 || lf < crlf) {\n    return { index: lf, length: 2 };\n  }\n  return { index: crlf, length: 4 };\n}\n\nfunction dispatchSseBlock(block: string, handlers: StreamMessageHandlers): void {\n  let eventName = \"message\";\n  const dataLines: string[] = [];\n\n  for (const line of block.split(/\\r?\\n/)) {\n    if (line.startsWith(\"event:\")) {\n      eventName = line.slice(\"event:\".length).trim();\n    } else if (line.startsWith(\"data:\")) {\n      dataLines.push(line.slice(\"data:\".length).trimStart());\n    }\n  }\n\n  const data = dataLines.join(\"\\n\");\n  if (data === \"\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (eventName === \"conversation\") {\n    handlers.onConversation(JSON.parse(data) as Conversation);\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (eventName === \"delta\") {\n    const payload = JSON.parse(data) as { content?: unknown };\n    if (typeof payload.content === \"string\") {\n      handlers.onDelta(payload.content);\n    }\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (eventName === \"error\") {\n    const payload = JSON.parse(data) as { error?: unknown };\n    throw new Error(typeof payload.error === \"string\" ? payload.error : \"stream failed\");\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function updateSettings(\n  settings: UpdateSettingsRequest\n): Promise<ChatState> {\n  return request<ChatState>(\"/api/settings\", {\n    method: \"PATCH\",\n options.body === undefined ? undefined : JSON.stringify(options.body)\n  });\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const error = await readError(response);\n    throw new Error(error);\n  }\n\n  if (response.status === 204) {\n    return undefined as T;\n  }\n\n  return (await response.json()) as T;\n}\n\nasync function readError(response: Response): Promise<string> {\n  try {\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: unknown };\n    if (typeof body.error === \"string\" && body.error.trim() !== \"\") {\n      return body.error;\n    }\n  } catch {\n    return kind: provider.kind,\n    baseUrl: provider.baseUrl,\n    model: provider.model,\n    apiKey: provider.apiKey,\n    systemPrompt: provider.systemPrompt\n  };\n}\n\nfunction settingsToJson(settings: UpdateSettingsRequest): JsonValue {\n  return {\n    activeProviderId: settings.activeProviderId,\n    theme: settings.theme\n  };\n}\n",

request<void>(`/api/conversations/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`, {\n    method: \"DELETE\"\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function updateConversation(\n  id: string,\n  updates: { pinned?: boolean }\n): Promise<Conversation> {\n  return request<Conversation>(`/api/conversations/${encodeURIComponent(id)}`, {\n    method: \"PATCH\",\n    body: { pinned: updates.pinned }\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function sendMessage(\n  conversationId: string,\n  content: string,\n  providerId?: string\n): Promise<Conversation> {\n  return request<Conversation>(\n    `/api/conversations/${encodeURIComponent(conversationId)}/messages`,\n    {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { content, providerId }\n    }\n  );\n}\n\nexport interface StreamMessageHandlers {\n  onConversation: (conversation: Conversation) => void;\n  onDelta: (content: string) => void;\n}\n\nexport async function streamMessage(\n  conversationId: string,\n  content: string,\n  providerId: string | undefined,\n  handlers: StreamMessageHandlers\n): Promise<void> {\n  const response = await fetch(\n    `/api/conversations/${encodeURIComponent(conversationId)}/messages/stream`,\n    {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: {\n        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"\n      },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ content, providerId })\n    }\n  );\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const error = await readError(response);\n    throw new Error(error);\n  }\n\n  if (response.body === null) {\n    throw new Error(\"streaming response was empty\");\n  }\n\n  await readSseStream(response.body, handlers);\n}\n\nexport async function saveProvider(\n  provider: SaveProviderRequest\n): Promise<PublicProvider> {\n  return request<PublicProvider>(\"/api/providers\", {\n    method: \"POST\",\n    body: providerToJson(provider)\n  });\n}\n\nasync function readSseStream(\n  body: ReadableStream<Uint8Array>,\n  handlers: StreamMessageHandlers\n): Promise<void> {\n  const reader = body.getReader();\n  const decoder = new TextDecoder();\n  let buffer = \"\";\n\n  for (;;) {\n    const { value, done } = await reader.read();\n    if (done) {\n      break;\n    }\n\n    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });\n    let eventBoundary = findSseBoundary(buffer);\n    while (eventBoundary !== null) {\n      const block = buffer.slice(0, eventBoundary.index);\n      buffer = buffer.slice(eventBoundary.index + eventBoundary.length);\n      dispatchSseBlock(block, handlers);\n      eventBoundary = findSseBoundary(buffer);\n    }\n  }\n\n  const rest = buffer.trim();\n  if (rest !== \"\") {\n    dispatchSseBlock(rest, handlers);\n  }\n}\n\nfunction findSseBoundary(buffer: string): { index: number; length: number } | null {\n  const lf = buffer.indexOf(\"\\n\\n\");\n  const crlf = buffer.indexOf(\"\\r\\n\\r\\n\");\n\n  if (lf === -1 && crlf === -1) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  if (lf === -1) {\n    return { index: crlf, length: 4 };\n  }\n  if (crlf === -1 || lf < crlf) {\n    return { index: lf, length: 2 };\n  }\n  return { index: crlf, length: 4 };\n}\n\nfunction dispatchSseBlock(block: string, handlers: StreamMessageHandlers): void {\n  let eventName = \"message\";\n  const dataLines: string[] = [];\n\n  for (const line of block.split(/\\r?\\n/)) {\n    if (line.startsWith(\"event:\")) {\n      eventName = line.slice(\"event:\".length).trim();\n    } else if (line.startsWith(\"data:\")) {\n      dataLines.push(line.slice(\"data:\".length).trimStart());\n    }\n  }\n\n  const data = dataLines.join(\"\\n\");\n  if (data === \"\") {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (eventName === \"conversation\") {\n    handlers.onConversation(JSON.parse(data) as Conversation);\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (eventName === \"delta\") {\n    const payload = JSON.parse(data) as { content?: unknown };\n    if (typeof payload.content === \"string\") {\n      handlers.onDelta(payload.content);\n    }\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (eventName === \"error\") {\n    const payload = JSON.parse(data) as { error?: unknown };\n    throw new Error(typeof payload.error === \"string\" ? payload.error : \"stream failed\");\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function updateSettings(\n  settings: UpdateSettingsRequest\n): Promise<ChatState> {\n  return request<ChatState>(\"/api/settings\", {\n    method: \"PATCH\",\n    body: settingsToJson(settings)\n  });\n}\n\nasync function request<T>(\n  path: string,\n  options: { method?: string; body?: JsonValue } = {}\n): Promise<T> {\n  const response = await fetch(path, {\n    method: options.method ?? \"GET\",\n    headers:\n      options.body === undefined\n        ? undefined\n        : {\n            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"\n          },\n    body: options.body === undefined ? undefined : JSON.stringify(options.body)\n  });\n\n  if (!response.ok) {\n    const error = await readError(response);\n    throw new Error(error);\n  }\n\n  if (response.status === 204) {\n    return undefined as T;\n  }\n\n  return (await response.json()) as T;\n}\n\nasync function readError(response: Response): Promise<string> {\n  try {\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: unknown };\n    if (typeof body.error === \"string\" && body.error.trim() !== \"\") {\n      return body.error;\n    }\n  } catch {\n    return response.statusText;\n  }\n  return response.statusText;\n}\n\nfunction providerToJson(provider: SaveProviderRequest): JsonValue {\n  return {\n    id: provider.id,\n    name: provider.name,\n    kind: provider.kind,\n    baseUrl: provider.baseUrl,\n    model: provider.model,\n    apiKey: provider.apiKey,\n    systemPrompt: provider.systemPrompt\n  };\n}\n\nfunction settingsToJson(settings: UpdateSettingsRequest): JsonValue {\n  return {\n    activeProviderId: settings.activeProviderId,\n    theme: settings.theme\n  };\n}\n",
  "status": "completed"
}

OpenAiCompatible,\n    Anthropic,\n}\n\nimpl ProviderKind {\n    pub fn chat_supported(&self) -> bool {\n        matches!(self, Self::OpenAiCompatible)\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize,   "source": "unified_exec_startup",
  "stdout": "import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\nimport {\n  createConversation,\n  deleteConversation,\n  getConversation,\n  getState,\n  streamMessage,\n  updateConversation,\n  updateSettings\n} from \"./api\";\nimport { ChatPanel } from \"./components/ChatPanel\";\nimport { SettingsPanel } from \"./components/SettingsPanel\";\nimport { Sidebar } from \"./components/Sidebar\";\nimport { applyTheme } from \"./themes\";\nimport type {\n  ChatMessageRecord,\n  ChatState,\n  Conversation,\n  PublicProvider,\n  ThemeName\n} from \"./types\";\n\ntype LoadState = \"idle\" | \"loading\" | \"ready\" | \"failed\";\n\nexport default function App() {\n  const [state, setState] = useState<ChatState | null>(null);\n  const [conversation, setConversation] = useState<Conversation | null>(null);\n  const [selectedConversationId, setSelectedConversationId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [settingsOpen, setSettingsOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(() => isMobileViewport());\n  const [sidebarMounted, setSidebarMounted] = useState(() => !isMobileViewport());\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(() => isMobileViewport());\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState<LoadState>(\"idle\");\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const sidebarOpenFrameRef = useRef<number | null>(null);\n\n  const activeProvider = useMemo(() => {\n    if (state === null) {\n      return null;\n    }\n    return state.providers.find((provider) => provider.id === state.activeProviderId) ?? null;\n  }, [state]);\n  const activeTheme = state?.theme ?? \"charcoal\";\n\n  const refreshState = useCallback(async () => {\n    const nextState = await getState();\n    setState(nextState);\n    applyTheme(nextState.theme);\n    return nextState;\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let active = true;\n    setLoading(\"loading\");\n    refreshState()\n      .then((nextState) => {\n        if (!active) {\n          return;\n        }\n        const firstConversation = nextState.conversations[0];\n        if (firstConversation !== undefined) {\n          setSelectedConversationId(firstConversation.id);\n        }\n        setLoading(\"ready\");\n      })\n      .catch((cause: unknown) => {\n        if (!active) {\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to load chat\");\n        setLoading(\"failed\");\n      });\n\n    return () => {\n      active = false;\n    };\n  }, [refreshState]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const media = window.matchMedia(\"(max-width: 767px)\");\n    const update = (): void => {\n      setIsMobile(media.matches);\n      if (media.matches) {\n        closeSidebar();\n      }\n    };\n\n    update();\n    media.addEventListener(\"change\", update);\n    return () => media.removeEventListener(\"change\", update);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!sidebarCollapsed) {\n      setSidebarMounted(true);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const timeout = window.setTimeout(() => {\n      setSidebarMounted(false);\n    }, SIDEBAR_ANIMATION_MS);\n\n    return () => window.clearTimeout(timeout);\n  }, [sidebarCollapsed]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    return () => {\n      if (sidebarOpenFrameRef.current !== null) {\n        window.cancelAnimationFrame(sidebarOpenFrameRef.current);\n      }\n    };\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let active = true;\n    if (selectedConversationId === null) {\n      setConversation(null);\n      return () => {\n        active = false;\n      };\n    }\n\n    getConversation(selectedConversationId)\n      .then((nextConversation) => {\n        if (active) {\n          setConversation(nextConversation);\n        }\n      })\n      .catch((cause: unknown) => {\n        if (active) {\n          setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to load conversation\");\n        }\n      });\n\n    return () => {\n      active = false;\n    };\n  }, [selectedConversationId]);\n\n  async function handleNewConversation(): Promise<void> {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const nextConversation = await createConversation();\n      setConversation(nextConversation);\n      setSelectedConversationId(nextConversation.id);\n      if (isMobile) {\n        closeSidebar();\n      }\n      await refreshState();\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to create conversation\");\n    } finally {\n      setBusy(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleDeleteConversation(id: string): Promise<void> {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await deleteConversation(id);\n      const nextState = await refreshState();\n      if (selectedConversationId === id) {\n        const nextConversation = nextState.conversations[0] ?? null;\n        setSelectedConversationId(nextConversation?.id ?? null);\n        setConversation(null);\n      }\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to delete conversation\");\n    } finally {\n      setBusy(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handlePinConversation(id: string, pinned: boolean): Promise<void> {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const updatedConversation = await updateConversation(id, { pinned });\n      if (selectedConversationId === id) {\n        setConversation(updatedConversation);\n      }\n      await refreshState();\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update conversation\");\n    } finally {\n      setBusy(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleSend(content: string): Promise<void> {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(null);\n    let attemptedConversationId = conversation?.id ?? null;\n    try {\n      const currentConversation = conversation ?? (await createConversation());\n      attemptedConversationId = currentConversation.id;\n      if (conversation === null) {\n        setSelectedConversationId(currentConversation.id);\n      }\n      setConversation(optimisticConversation(currentConversation, content, activeProvider?.id));\n      await streamMessage(\n        currentConversation.id,\n        content,\n        activeProvider?.id,\n        {\n          onConversation: (nextConversation) => {\n            setConversation(nextConversation);\n            setSelectedConversationId(nextConversation.id);\n          },\n          onDelta: (delta) => {\n            setConversation((current) =>\n              appendAssistantDelta(current, currentConversation.id, delta, activeProvider?.id)\n            );\n          }\n        }\n      );\n      await refreshState();\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to send message\");\n      if (attemptedConversationId !== null) {\n        const updatedConversation = await getConversation(attemptedConversationId).catch(() => null);\n        if (updatedConversation !== null) {\n          setConversation(updatedConversation);\n          setSelectedConversationId(updatedConversation.id);\n          await refreshState();\n        }\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setBusy(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleSelectConversation(id: string): void {\n    setSelectedConversationId(id);\n    if (isMobile) {\n      closeSidebar();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleOpenSettings(): void {\n    setSettingsOpen(true);\n    if (isMobile) {\n      closeSidebar();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function openSidebar(): void {\n    if (sidebarOpenFrameRef.current !== null) {\n      window.cancelAnimationFrame(sidebarOpenFrameRef.current);\n    }\n\n    setSidebarMounted(true);\n    sidebarOpenFrameRef.current = window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {\n      setSidebarCollapsed(false);\n      sidebarOpenFrameRef.current = null;\n    });\n  }\n\n  function closeSidebar(): void {\n    if (sidebarOpenFrameRef.current !== null) {\n      window.cancelAnimationFrame(sidebarOpenFrameRef.current);\n      sidebarOpenFrameRef.current = null;\n    }\n\n    setSidebarCollapsed(true);\n  }\n\n  function toggleSidebar(): void {\n    if (sidebarCollapsed) {\n      openSidebar();\n    } else {\n      closeSidebar();\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleProviderChange(providerId: string): Promise<void> {\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const nextState = await updateSettings({ activeProviderId: providerId });\n      setState(nextState);\n      applyTheme(nextState.theme);\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update provider\");\n      throw cause;\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleThemeChange(theme: ThemeName): Promise<void> {\n    setError(null);\n    applyTheme(theme);\n    try {\n      const nextState = await updateSettings({ theme });\n      setState(nextState);\n      applyTheme(nextState.theme);\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update theme\");\n      throw cause;\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleProvidersChanged(provider?: PublicProvider): Promise<void> {\n    const nextState = await refreshState();\n    if (provider !== undefined && provider.chatSupported) {\n      const updatedState = await updateSettings({ activeProviderId: provider.id });\n      setState(updatedState);\n      applyTheme(updatedState.theme);\n      return;\n    }\n    setState(nextState);\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <main className=\"app-shell min-h-dvh text-[var(--text)]\">\n      <div\n        className={[\n          \"chat-layout\",\n          sidebarCollapsed ? \"chat-layout-collapsed\" : \"\"\n        ].join(\" \")}\n      >\n        {sidebarMounted ? (\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className={[\n              \"mobile-sidebar-backdrop md:hidden\",\n              sidebarCollapsed ? \"mobile-sidebar-backdrop-closed\" : \"\"\n            ].join(\" \")}\n            aria-label=\"Close sidebar\"\n            onClick={closeSidebar}\n          />\n        ) : null}\n        <div\n          className={[\n            \"sidebar-frame\",\n            sidebarCollapsed ? \"sidebar-frame-collapsed\" : \"\"\n          ].join(\" \")}\n        >\n          {sidebarMounted ? (\n            <Sidebar\n              state={state}\n              selectedConversationId={selectedConversationId}\n              activeProvider={activeProvider}\n              busy={busy}\n              collapsed={sidebarCollapsed}\n              theme={activeTheme}\n              onNewConversation={handleNewConversation}\n              onSelectConversation={handleSelectConversation}\n              onDeleteConversation={handleDeleteConversation}\n              onPinConversation={handlePinConversation}\n              onOpenSettings={handleOpenSettings}\n              onThemeChange={handleThemeChange}\n              onCollapse={closeSidebar}\n            />\n          ) : null}\n        </div>\n        <ChatPanel\n          conversation={conversation}\n          activeProvider={activeProvider}\n          busy={busy}\n          error={error}\n          loading={loading}\n          sidebarCollapsed={sidebarCollapsed}\n          onToggleSidebar={toggleSidebar}\n          onSend={handleSend}\n        />\n      </div>\n      {settingsOpen && state !== null ?
