  "aggregated_output": "import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\nimport {\n  createConversation,\n  deleteConversation,\n  getConversation,\n  getState,\n  streamMessage,\n  updateConversation,\n  updateSettings\n} from \"./api\";\nimport { ChatPanel } from \"./components/ChatPanel\";\nimport { SettingsPanel } from \"./components/SettingsPanel\";\nimport { Sidebar } from \"./components/Sidebar\";\nimport { applyTheme } from \"./themes\";\nimport type {\n  ChatMessageRecord,\n  ChatState,\n  Conversation,\n  PublicProvider,\n  ThemeName\n} from \"./types\";\n\ntype LoadState = \"idle\" | \"loading\" | \"ready\" | \"failed\";\n\nexport default function App() {\n  const [state, setState] = useState<ChatState | null>(null);\n  const [conversation, setConversation] = useState<Conversation | null>(null);\n  const [selectedConversationId, setSelectedConversationId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [settingsOpen, setSettingsOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(() => isMobileViewport());\n  const [sidebarMounted, setSidebarMounted] = useState(() => !isMobileViewport());\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(() => isMobileViewport());\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState<LoadState>(\"idle\");\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const sidebarOpenFrameRef = useRef<number | null>(null);\n\n  const activeProvider = useMemo(() => {\n    if (state === null) {\n      return null;\n    }\n    return state.providers.find((provider) => provider.id === state.activeProviderId) ?? null;\n  }, [state]);\n  const activeTheme = state?.theme ?? \"charcoal\";\n\n  const refreshState = useCallback(async () => {\n    const nextState = await getState();\n    setState(nextState);\n    applyTheme(nextState.theme);\n    return nextState;\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let active = true;\n    setLoading(\"loading\");\n    refreshState()\n      .then((nextState) => {\n        if (!active) {\n          return;\n        }\n        const firstConversation = nextState.conversations[0];\n        if (firstConversation !== undefined) {\n          setSelectedConversationId(firstConversation.id);\n        }\n        setLoading(\"ready\");\n      })\n      .catch((cause: unknown) => {\n        if (!active) {\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to load chat\");\n        setLoading(\"failed\");\n      });\n\n    return () => {\n      active = false;\n    };\n  }, [refreshState]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const media = window.matchMedia(\"(max-width: 767px)\");\n    const update = (): void => {\n      setIsMobile(media.matches);\n      if (media.matches) {\n        closeSidebar();\n      }\n    };\n\n    update();\n    media.addEventListener(\"change\", update);\n    return () => media.removeEventListener(\"change\", update);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!sidebarCollapsed) {\n      setSidebarMounted(true);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const timeout = window.setTimeout(() => {\n      setSidebarMounted(false);\n    }, SIDEBAR_ANIMATION_MS);\n\n    return () => window.clearTimeout(timeout);\n  }, [sidebarCollapsed]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    return () => {\n      if (sidebarOpenFrameRef.current !== null) {\n        window.cancelAnimationFrame(sidebarOpenFrameRef.current);\n      }\n    };\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let active = true;\n    if (selectedConversationId === null) {\n      setConversation(null);\n      return () => {\n        active = false;\n      };\n    }\n\n    getConversation(selectedConversationId)\n      .then((nextConversation) => {\n        if (active) {\n          setConversation(nextConversation);\n        }\n      })\n      .catch((cause: unknown) => {\n        if (active) {\n          setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to load conversation\");\n        }\n      });\n\n    return () => {\n      active = false;\n    };\n  }, [selectedConversationId]);\n\n  async function handleNewConversation(): Promise<void> {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const nextConversation = await createConversation();\n      setConversation(nextConversation);\n      setSelectedConversationId(nextConversation.id);\n      if (isMobile) {\n        closeSidebar();\n      }\n      await refreshState();\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to create conversation\");\n    } finally {\n      setBusy(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleDeleteConversation(id: string): Promise<void> {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await deleteConversation(id);\n      const nextState = await refreshState();\n      if (selectedConversationId === id) {\n        const nextConversation = nextState.conversations[0] ?? null;\n        setSelectedConversationId(nextConversation?.id ?? null);\n        setConversation(null);\n      }\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to delete conversation\");\n    } finally {\n      setBusy(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handlePinConversation(id: string, pinned: boolean): Promise<void> {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const updatedConversation = await updateConversation(id, { pinned });\n      if (selectedConversationId === id) {\n        setConversation(updatedConversation);\n      }\n      await refreshState();\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update conversation\");\n    } finally {\n      setBusy(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleSend(content: string): Promise<void> {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(null);\n    let attemptedConversationId = conversation?.id ?? null;\n    try {\n      const currentConversation = conversation ?? (await createConversation());\n      attemptedConversationId = currentConversation.id;\n      if (conversation === null) {\n        setSelectedConversationId(currentConversation.id);\n      }\n      setConversation(optimisticConversation(currentConversation, content, activeProvider?.id));\n      await streamMessage(\n        currentConversation.id,\n        content,\n        activeProvider?.id,\n        {\n          onConversation: (nextConversation) => {\n            setConversation(nextConversation);\n            setSelectedConversationId(nextConversation.id);\n          },\n          onDelta: (delta) => {\n            setConversation((current) =>\n              appendAssistantDelta(current, currentConversation.id, delta, activeProvider?.id)\n            );\n          }\n        }\n      );\n      await refreshState();\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to send message\");\n      if (attemptedConversationId !== null) {\n        const updatedConversation = await getConversation(attemptedConversationId).catch(() => null);\n        if (updatedConversation !== null) {\n          setConversation(updatedConversation);\n          setSelectedConversationId(updatedConversation.id);\n          await refreshState();\n        }\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setBusy(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleSelectConversation(id: string): void {\n    setSelectedConversationId(id);\n    if (isMobile) {\n      closeSidebar();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleOpenSettings(): void {\n    setSettingsOpen(true);\n    if (isMobile) {\n      closeSidebar();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function openSidebar(): void {\n    if (sidebarOpenFrameRef.current !== null) {\n      window.cancelAnimationFrame(sidebarOpenFrameRef.current);\n    }\n\n    setSidebarMounted(true);\n    sidebarOpenFrameRef.current = window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {\n      setSidebarCollapsed(false);\n      sidebarOpenFrameRef.current = null;\n    });\n  }\n\n  function closeSidebar(): void {\n    if (sidebarOpenFrameRef.current !== null) {\n      window.cancelAnimationFrame(sidebarOpenFrameRef.current);\n      sidebarOpenFrameRef.current = null;\n    }\n\n    setSidebarCollapsed(true);\n  }\n\n  function toggleSidebar(): void {\n    if (sidebarCollapsed) {\n      openSidebar();\n    } else {\n      closeSidebar();\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleProviderChange(providerId: string): Promise<void> {\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const nextState = await updateSettings({ activeProviderId: providerId });\n      setState(nextState);\n      applyTheme(nextState.theme);\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update provider\");\n      throw cause;\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleThemeChange(theme: ThemeName): Promise<void> {\n    setError(null);\n    applyTheme(theme);\n    try {\n      const nextState = await updateSettings({ theme });\n      setState(nextState);\n      applyTheme(nextState.theme);\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update theme\");\n      throw cause;\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function handleProvidersChanged(provider?: PublicProvider): Promise<void> {\n    const nextState = await refreshState();\n    if (provider !== undefined && provider.chatSupported) {\n      const updatedState = await updateSettings({ activeProviderId: provider.id });\n      setState(updatedState);\n      applyTheme(updatedState.theme);\n      return;\n    }\n    setState(nextState);\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <main className=\"app-shell min-h-dvh text-[var(--text)]\">\n      <div\n        className={[\n          \"chat-layout\",\n          sidebarCollapsed ? (\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className={[\n              \"mobile-sidebar-backdrop md:hidden\",\n              sidebarCollapsed ? \"mobile-sidebar-backdrop-closed\" : \"\"\n            ].join(\" \")}\n            aria-label=\"Close sidebar\"\n            onClick={closeSidebar}\n          />\n        ) : null}\n        <div\n          className={[\n            \"sidebar-frame\",\n            sidebarCollapsed ? \"sidebar-frame-collapsed\" : \"\"\n          ].join(\" \")}\n        >\n          {sidebarMounted ? ```

## Assistant

The frontend already exposes a provider selector in settings and sends the selected provider id with each chat request. What it does not do yet is discover models from `/v1/models`, so today the provider list is file-backed and user-managed rather than proxy-backed.

**Tool Call: Read ChatPanel.tsx**
Status: Completed

(\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">loading</p>\n          ) : conversation === null || conversation.messages.length === 0 ? (\n            <StartPanel\n              providerName={activeProvider?.name ?? \"No provider configured\"}\n              disabled={busy}\n              onSelectPrompt={useStarterPrompt}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <MessageThread messages={conversation.messages} busy={busy} />\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <footer className=\"composer-shell border-t border-[var(--line)] p-3 sm:p-5\">\n        <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n          {error !== null ? null}\n          <div className=\"rounded-md border border-[var(--line)] bg-[var(--panel)] p-2 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)]\">\n            <textarea\n              className=\"composer-input max-h-28 min-h-12 w-full resize-none rounded border-0 bg-transparent px-2 py-2 text-base leading-6 text-[var(--text)] outline-none sm:text-sm\"\n              rows={2}\n              placeholder={`Message ${activeProvider?.name ?? \"rafael\"}...`}\n              value={draft}\n              disabled={busy}\n              onChange={(event) => setDraft(event.target.value)}\n              onKeyDown={(event) => {\n                if (event.key === \"Enter\" && !event.shiftKey) {\n                  event.preventDefault();\n                  void submit();\n                }\n              }}\n            />\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-t border-[var(--line)] px-2 pt-2\">\n              <span className=\"truncate text-xs   "stdout": "import { useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\nimport type { ReactNode, SelectHTMLAttributes } from \"react\";\nimport { ChevronDown, Moon, Sun, X } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { saveProvider } from \"../api\";\nimport { compactModelName } from \"../display\";\nimport {\n  composeTheme,\n  themeBase,\n  themeMode,\n  themes,\n  toggledTheme,\n  type ThemeBaseName\n} from \"../themes\";\nimport type {\n  ProviderKind,\n  PublicProvider,\n  SaveProviderRequest,\n  ThemeName\n} from \"../types\";\n\ninterface SettingsPanelProps {\n  providers: PublicProvider[];\n  activeProviderId: string;\n  theme: ThemeName;\n  onClose: () => void;\n  onSaved: (provider?: PublicProvider) => Promise<void>;\n  onProviderChange: (id: string) => Promise<void>;\n  onThemeChange: (theme: ThemeName) => Promise<void>;\n}\n\ninterface ProviderFormState {\n  id?: string;\n  name: string;\n  kind: ProviderKind;\n  baseUrl: string;\n  model: string;\n  apiKey: string;\n  systemPrompt: string;\n}\n\nconst emptyProvider: ProviderFormState = {\n  name: \"\",\n  kind: \"open_ai_compatible\",\n  baseUrl: \"\",\n  model: \"\",\n  apiKey: \"\",\n  systemPrompt: \"\"\n};\n\nexport function SettingsPanel({\n  providers,\n  activeProviderId,\n  theme,\n  onClose,\n  onSaved,\n  onProviderChange,\n  onThemeChange\n}: SettingsPanelProps) {\n  const activeProvider =\n    providers.find((provider) => provider.id === activeProviderId) ?? providers[0];\n  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string>(activeProvider?.id ?? \"new\");\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<ProviderFormState>(() =>\n    activeProvider === undefined ? emptyProvider : providerToForm(activeProvider)\n  );\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  const selectedProvider = useMemo(\n    () => providers.find((provider) => provider.id === editingId),\n    [editingId, providers]\n  );\n  const mode = themeMode(theme);\n  const switchToMode = mode === \"dark\" ? \"light\" : \"dark\";\n\n  function chooseProvider(id: string): void {\n    setEditingId(id);\n    const provider = providers.find((item) => item.id === id);\n    setForm(provider === undefined ? emptyProvider : providerToForm(provider));\n    setError(null);\n  }\n\n  async function submit(): Promise<void> {\n    setSaving(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const request = formToRequest(form, selectedProvider);\n      const provider = await saveProvider(request);\n      await onSaved(provider);\n      setEditingId(provider.id);\n      setForm(providerToForm(provider));\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to save provider\");\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function updateActiveProvider(providerId: string): Promise<void> {\n    setSaving(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await onProviderChange(providerId);\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update model\");\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function updateTheme(themeName: ThemeName): Promise<void> {\n    setSaving(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await onThemeChange(themeName);\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update theme\");\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"settings-overlay\">\n      <section className=\"settings-modal\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-labelledby=\"settings-title\">\n        <header className=\"settings-header\">\n          <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n            <h2 id=\"settings-title\" className=\"text-base font-semibold\">\n              Settings\n            </h2>\n            {activeProvider !== undefined ? (\n              <p className=\"mt-1 truncate text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\" title={activeProvider.model}>\n                {activeProvider.name} · {compactModelName(activeProvider.model)}\n              </p>\n            ) : null}\n          </div>\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className=\"icon-button icon-button-subtle\"\n            aria-label=\"Close settings\"\n            title=\"Close settings\"\n            onClick={onClose}\n          >\n            <X aria-hidden=\"true\" size={17} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n          </button>\n        </header>\n\n        <div className=\"settings-body\">\n          <section className=\"settings-section\">\n            <h3 className=\"settings-section-title\">Chat</h3>\n            <div className=\"settings-grid settings-grid-two\">\n              <Field label=\"Active model\">\n                <SelectControl\n                  value={activeProviderId}\n                  disabled={saving || providers.length === 0}\n                  onChange={(event) => void updateActiveProvider(event.target.value)}\n                >\n                  {providers.length === 0 ? <option value=\"\">No providers</option> : null}\n                  {providers.map((provider) => (\n                    <option key={provider.id} value={provider.id} disabled={!provider.chatSupported}>\n                      {provider.name}\n                    </option>\n                  ))}\n                </SelectControl>\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"Theme\">\n                <div className=\"grid grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_auto] gap-2\">\n                  <SelectControl\n                    value={themeBase(theme)}\n                    disabled={saving}\n                    onChange={(event) =>\n                      void updateTheme(\n                        composeTheme(event.target.value as ThemeBaseName, mode)\n                      )\n                    }\n                  >\n                    {themes.map((themeOption) => (\n                      <option key={themeOption.value} value={themeOption.value}>\n                        {themeOption.label}\n                      </option>\n                    ))}\n                  </SelectControl>\n                  <button\n                    type=\"button\"\n                    className=\"theme-mode-button\"\n                    disabled={saving}\n                    title={`Switch to ${switchToMode} mode`}\n                    onClick={() => void updateTheme(toggledTheme(theme))}\n                  >\n                    {switchToMode === \"light\" ? (\n                      <Sun aria-hidden=\"true\" size={15} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n                    ) : (\n                      <Moon aria-hidden=\"true\" size={15} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n                    )}\n                    {switchToMode === \"light\" ? \"Light\" : \"Dark\"}\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n              </Field>\n            </div>\n          </section>\n\n          <section className=\"settings-section\">\n            <div className=\"settings-section-heading\">\n              <h3 className=\"settings-section-title\">Provider</h3>\n              <SelectControl\n                id=\"provider-edit\"\n                className=\"settings-provider-select\"\n                value={editingId}\n                onChange={(event) => chooseProvider(event.target.value)}\n              >\n                {providers.map((provider) => (\n                  <option key={provider.id} value={provider.id}>\n                    {provider.name}\n                  </option>\n                ))}\n                <option value=\"new\">New provider</option>\n              </SelectControl>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"settings-grid settings-grid-two\">\n              <Field label=\"Name\">\n                <input\n                  className=\"control\"\n                  value={form.name}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, name: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"Type\">\n                <SelectControl\n                  value={form.kind}\n                  onChange={(event) =>\n                    setForm({ ...form, kind: event.target.value as ProviderKind })\n                  }\n                >\n                  <option value=\"open_ai_compatible\">OpenAI compatible</option>\n                  <option value=\"anthropic\">Anthropic</option>\n                </SelectControl>\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"Base URL\">\n                <input\n                  className=\"control\"\n                  value={form.baseUrl}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, baseUrl: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"Model\">\n                <input\n                  className=\"control\"\n                  value={form.model}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, model: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"API key\">\n                <input\n                  className=\"control\"\n                  type=\"password\"\n                  value={form.apiKey}\n                  placeholder={selectedProvider?.hasApiKey ? \"stored\" : \"\"}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, apiKey: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"System\" className=\"settings-field-wide\">\n                <textarea\n                  className=\"control min-h-24 resize-y\"\n                  value={form.systemPrompt}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, systemPrompt: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n            </div>\n          </section>\n\n          {error !== null ? (\n            <div className=\"rounded-md border border-[var(--danger)] bg-[var(--danger-bg)] px-3 py-2 text-sm text-[var(--danger-text)]\">\n              {error}\n            </div>\n          ) : null}\n        </div>\n\n        <footer className=\"settings-footer\">\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className=\"button-primary\"\n            disabled={saving}\n            onClick={() => void submit()}\n          >\n            Save provider\n          </button>\n        </footer>\n      </section>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction SelectControl({\n  children,\n  className,\n  ...props\n}: SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>) {\n  return (\n    <span className={[\"select-shell\", className ?? \"\"].join(\" \")}>\n      <select className=\"control select-control\" {...props}>\n        {children}\n      </select>\n      <ChevronDown\n        aria-hidden=\"true\"\n        className=\"select-chevron\"\n        size={16}\n        strokeWidth={2.1}\n      />\n    </span>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction Field({\n  label,\n  children,\n  className\n}: {\n  label: string;\n  children: ReactNode;\n  className?: string;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <label className={[\"grid gap-2\", className ?? \"\"].join(\" \")}>\n      <span className=\"control-label\">{label}</span>\n      {children}\n    </label>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction providerToForm(provider: PublicProvider): ProviderFormState {\n  return {\n    id: provider.id,\n    name: provider.name,\n    kind: provider.kind,\n    baseUrl: provider.baseUrl,\n    model: provider.model,\n    apiKey: \"\",\n    systemPrompt: provider.systemPrompt ?? \"\"\n  };\n}\n\nfunction formToRequest(\n  form: ProviderFormState,\n  selectedProvider: PublicProvider | undefined\n): SaveProviderRequest {\n  const apiKey = form.apiKey.trim();\n  return {\n    id: selectedProvider === undefined ? undefined : form.id,\n    name: form.name,\n    kind: form.kind,\n    baseUrl: form.baseUrl,\n    model: form.model,\n    apiKey: apiKey === \"\" ? undefined : apiKey,\n    systemPrompt: form.systemPrompt.trim() === \"\" ? undefined : form.systemPrompt\n  };\n}\n",

cause.message : \"failed to save provider\");\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function updateActiveProvider(providerId: string): Promise<void> {\n    setSaving(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await onProviderChange(providerId);\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update model\");\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function updateTheme(themeName: ThemeName): Promise<void> {\n    setSaving(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await onThemeChange(themeName);\n    } catch (cause) {\n      setError(cause instanceof Error ? cause.message : \"failed to update theme\");\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"settings-overlay\">\n      <section className=\"settings-modal\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-labelledby=\"settings-title\">\n        <header className=\"settings-header\">\n          <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n            <h2 id=\"settings-title\" className=\"text-base font-semibold\">\n              Settings\n            </h2>\n            {activeProvider !== undefined ? (\n              <p className=\"mt-1 truncate text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\" title={activeProvider.model}>\n                {activeProvider.name} · {compactModelName(activeProvider.model)}\n              </p>\n            ) : null}\n          </div>\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className=\"icon-button icon-button-subtle\"\n            aria-label=\"Close settings\"\n            title=\"Close settings\"\n            onClick={onClose}\n          >\n            <X aria-hidden=\"true\" size={17} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n          </button>\n        </header>\n\n        <div className=\"settings-body\">\n          <section className=\"settings-section\">\n            <h3 className=\"settings-section-title\">Chat</h3>\n            <div className=\"settings-grid settings-grid-two\">\n              <Field label=\"Active model\">\n                <SelectControl\n                  value={activeProviderId}\n                  disabled={saving || providers.length === 0}\n                  onChange={(event) => void updateActiveProvider(event.target.value)}\n                >\n                  {providers.length === 0 ? <option value=\"\">No providers</option> : null}\n                  {providers.map((provider) => (\n                    <option key={provider.id} value={provider.id} disabled={!provider.chatSupported}>\n                      {provider.name}\n                    </option>\n                  ))}\n                </SelectControl>\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"Theme\">\n                <div className=\"grid grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_auto] gap-2\">\n                  <SelectControl\n                    value={themeBase(theme)}\n                    disabled={saving}\n                    onChange={(event) =>\n                      void updateTheme(\n                        composeTheme(event.target.value as ThemeBaseName, mode)\n                      )\n                    }\n                  >\n                    {themes.map((themeOption) => (\n                      <option key={themeOption.value} value={themeOption.value}>\n                        {themeOption.label}\n                      </option>\n                    ))}\n                  </SelectControl>\n                  <button\n                    type=\"button\"\n                    className=\"theme-mode-button\"\n                    disabled={saving}\n                    title={`Switch to ${switchToMode} mode`}\n                    onClick={() => void updateTheme(toggledTheme(theme))}\n                  >\n                    {switchToMode === \"light\" ? (\n                      <Sun aria-hidden=\"true\" size={15} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n                    ) : (\n                      <Moon aria-hidden=\"true\" size={15} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n                    )}\n                    {switchToMode === \"light\" ? \"Light\" : \"Dark\"}\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n              </Field>\n            </div>\n          </section>\n\n          <section className=\"settings-section\">\n            <div className=\"settings-section-heading\">\n              <h3 className=\"settings-section-title\">Provider</h3>\n              <SelectControl\n                id=\"provider-edit\"\n                className=\"settings-provider-select\"\n                value={editingId}\n                onChange={(event) => chooseProvider(event.target.value)}\n              >\n                {providers.map((provider) => (\n                  <option key={provider.id} value={provider.id}>\n                    {provider.name}\n                  </option>\n                ))}\n                <option value=\"new\">New provider</option>\n              </SelectControl>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"settings-grid settings-grid-two\">\n              <Field label=\"Name\">\n                <input\n                  className=\"control\"\n                  value={form.name}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, name: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"Type\">\n                <SelectControl\n                  value={form.kind}\n                  onChange={(event) =>\n                    setForm({ ...form, kind: event.target.value as ProviderKind })\n                  }\n                >\n                  <option value=\"open_ai_compatible\">OpenAI compatible</option>\n                  <option value=\"anthropic\">Anthropic</option>\n                </SelectControl>\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"Base URL\">\n                <input\n                  className=\"control\"\n                  value={form.baseUrl}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, baseUrl: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"Model\">\n                <input\n                  className=\"control\"\n                  value={form.model}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, model: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"API key\">\n                <input\n                  className=\"control\"\n                  type=\"password\"\n                  value={form.apiKey}\n                  placeholder={selectedProvider?.hasApiKey ? \"stored\" : \"\"}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, apiKey: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n              <Field label=\"System\" className=\"settings-field-wide\">\n                <textarea\n                  className=\"control min-h-24 resize-y\"\n                  value={form.systemPrompt}\n                  onChange={(event) => setForm({ ...form, systemPrompt: event.target.value })}\n                />\n              </Field>\n            </div>\n          </section>\n\n          {error !== null ? (\n            <div className=\"rounded-md border border-[var(--danger)] bg-[var(--danger-bg)] px-3 py-2 text-sm text-[var(--danger-text)]\">\n              {error}\n            </div>\n          ) : null}\n        </div>\n\n        <footer className=\"settings-footer\">\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className=\"button-primary\"\n            disabled={saving}\n            onClick={() => void submit()}\n          >\n            Save provider\n          </button>\n        </footer>\n      </section>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction SelectControl({\n  children,\n  className,\n  ...props\n}: SelectHTMLAttributes<HTMLSelectElement>) {\n  return (\n    <span className={[\"select-shell\", className ?? \"\"].join(\" \")}>\n      <select className=\"control select-control\" {...props}>\n        {children}\n      </select>\n      <ChevronDown\n        aria-hidden=\"true\"\n        className=\"select-chevron\"\n        size={16}\n        strokeWidth={2.1}\n      />\n    </span>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction Field({\n  label,\n  children,\n  className\n}: {\n  label: string;\n  children: ReactNode;\n  className?: string;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <label className={[\"grid gap-2\", className ?? \"\"].join(\" \")}>\n      <span className=\"control-label\">{label}</span>\n      {children}\n    </label>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction providerToForm(provider: PublicProvider): ProviderFormState {\n  return {\n    id: provider.id,\n    name: provider.name,\n    kind: provider.kind,\n    baseUrl: provider.baseUrl,\n    model: provider.model,\n    apiKey: \"\",\n    systemPrompt: provider.systemPrompt ?? \"\"\n  };\n}\n\nfunction formToRequest(\n  form: ProviderFormState,\n  selectedProvider: PublicProvider | undefined\n): SaveProviderRequest {\n  const apiKey = form.apiKey.trim();\n  return {\n    id: selectedProvider === undefined ? undefined : form.id,\n    name: form.name,\n    kind: form.kind,\n    baseUrl: form.baseUrl,\n    model: form.model,\n    apiKey: apiKey === \"\" ? undefined : apiKey,\n    systemPrompt: form.systemPrompt.trim() === \"\" ? undefined : form.systemPrompt\n  };\n}\n",
  "status": "completed"
}

[];\n  const pinnedConversations = conversations.filter((conversation) => conversation.pinned);\n  const recentConversations = conversations.filter((conversation) => !conversation.pinned);\n  const [openMenuId, setOpenMenuId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const switchToMode = themeMode(theme) === \"dark\" ? \"light\" : \"dark\";\n\n  return (\n    <aside\n      className={[\n        \"sidebar-shell sidebar-drawer fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-40 w-[min(88vw,320px)] border-r border-[var(--line)] md:sticky md:top-0 md:z-auto md:h-dvh md:w-[320px]\",\n        collapsed ? \"sidebar-drawer-collapsed\" : \"\"\n      ].join(\" \")}\n      aria-hidden={collapsed}\n    >\n      <div className=\"flex h-full min-h-0 flex-col gap-4 p-4 sm:gap-5 sm:p-5\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between gap-3\">\n          <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-base font-semibold\">rafael</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"mt-1 truncate text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\"\n              title={providerConnectionTitle(activeProvider)}\n            >\n              {providerConnectionLabel(activeProvider)}\n            </p>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <button\n              type=\"button\"\n              className=\"icon-button icon-button-subtle\"\n              aria-label=\"Collapse sidebar\"\n              title=\"Collapse sidebar\"\n              onClick={onCollapse}\n            >\n              <PanelLeftClose aria-hidden=\"true\" size={17} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n            </button>\n            <button\n              type=\"button\"\n              className=\"icon-button icon-button-subtle\"\n              aria-label={`Switch to ${switchToMode} mode`}\n              title={`Switch to ${switchToMode} mode`}\n              onClick={() => void onThemeChange(toggledTheme(theme)).catch(() => undefined)}\n            >\n              {switchToMode === \"light\" ? (\n            <ConversationSection\n              label=\"Pinned\"\n              conversations={pinnedConversations}\n              selectedConversationId={selectedConversationId}\n              busy={busy}\n              openMenuId={openMenuId}\n              onSelectConversation={onSelectConversation}\n              onDeleteConversation={onDeleteConversation}\n              onPinConversation={onPinConversation}\n              onMenuToggle={(id) => setOpenMenuId(openMenuId === id ? null : id)}\n              onMenuClose={() => setOpenMenuId(null)}\n            />\n          ) : null}\n          <ConversationSection\n            label={pinnedConversations.length > 0 ? \"Recent\" : \"Conversations\"}\n            conversations={recentConversations}\n            selectedConversationId={selectedConversationId}\n            busy={busy}\n            openMenuId={openMenuId}\n            onSelectConversation={onSelectConversation}\n            onDeleteConversation={onDeleteConversation}\n            onPinConversation={onPinConversation}\n            onMenuToggle={(id) => setOpenMenuId(openMenuId === id ? null : id)}\n            onMenuClose={() => setOpenMenuId(null)}\n          />\n          {conversations.length === 0 ? (\n            <p className=\"rounded-md border border-dashed border-[var(--line)] px-3 py-4 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">\n              Nothing saved yet.\n            </p>\n          ) : null}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </aside>\n  );\n}\n\ninterface ConversationSectionProps {\n  label: string;\n  conversations: ConversationSummary[];\n  selectedConversationId: string | null;\n  busy: onMenuToggle: (id: string) => void;\n  onMenuClose: () => void;\n}\n\nfunction ConversationSection({\n  label,\n  conversations,\n  selectedConversationId,\n  busy,\n  openMenuId,\n  onSelectConversation,\n  onDeleteConversation,\n  onPinConversation,\n  onMenuToggle,\n  onMenuClose\n}: ConversationSectionProps) {\n  if (conversations.length === 0) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <section className=\"mb-5 grid gap-2\">\n      <span className=\"control-label\">{label}</span>\n      {conversations.map((conversation) => (\n        <ConversationButton\n       onDelete={onDeleteConversation}\n          onPin={onPinConversation}\n          menuOpen={openMenuId === conversation.id}\n          onMenuToggle={onMenuToggle}\n          onMenuClose={onMenuClose}\n        />\n      ))}\n    </section>\n  );\n}\n\ninterface ConversationButtonProps {\n  conversation: ConversationSummary;\n  selected: boolean;\n  disabled: boolean;\n void;\n}\n\nfunction ConversationButton({\n  conversation,\n  selected,\n  disabled,\n  menuOpen,\n  onSelect,\n  onDelete,\n  onPin,\n  onMenuToggle,\n  onMenuClose\n}: ConversationButtonProps) {\n  const [confirmingDelete, setConfirmingDelete] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!menuOpen) {\n      setConfirmingDelete(false);\n    }\n  }, [menuOpen]);\n\n  return (\n    <div\n      className={[\n        \"conversation-row group relative grid grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_32px] items-center gap-1 rounded-md transition-colors\",\n        selected ? \"conversation-row-selected\" : \"\"\n      ].join(\" \")}\n    >\n      <button\n        type=\"button\"\n        className=\"min-w-0 px-2.5 py-2 text-left\"\n        disabled={disabled}\n        onClick={() => (\n        <div className=\"conversation-menu absolute right-1 top-9 z-10 min-w-32 rounded-md border border-[var(--line)] bg-[var(--panel)] p-1 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)]\">\n          {confirmingDelete ? (\n            <div className=\"conversation-delete-confirm\">\n              <p>Delete this chat?</p>\n              <div className=\"conversation-confirm-actions\">\n                <button\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  className=\"conversation-confirm-button\"\n                  disabled={disabled}\n                  onClick={() => setConfirmingDelete(false)}\n                >\n                  Cancel\n                </button>\n                <button\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  className=\"conversation-confirm-button conversation-confirm-button-danger\"\n                  disabled={disabled}\n                  onClick={() => {\n                    onDelete(conversation.id);\n                    setConfirmingDelete(false);\n                    onMenuClose();\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Delete\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <button\n                type=\"button\"\n                className=\"conversation-menu-item\"\n                disabled={disabled}\n                onClick={() => {\n                  onPin(conversation.id, !conversation.pinned);\n                  onMenuClose();\n                }}\n              >\n                {conversation.pinned ?   "stderr": "",
  "aggregated_output": "import {\n  MoreVertical,\n  Moon,\n  PanelLeftClose,\n  Pin,\n  PinOff,\n  Plus,\n  Settings,\n  Sun,\n  Trash2\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport {\n  providerConnectionLabel,\n  providerConnectionTitle\n} from \"../display\";\nimport { themeMode, toggledTheme } from \"../themes\";\nimport type { ChatState, ConversationSummary, PublicProvider, ThemeName } from \"../types\";\n\ninterface SidebarProps {\n  state: ChatState | null;\n  selectedConversationId: string | null;\n  activeProvider: PublicProvider | null;\n  busy: boolean;\n  collapsed: boolean;\n  theme: ThemeName;\n  onNewConversation: () => void;\n  onSelectConversation: (id: string) => void;\n  onDeleteConversation: (id: string) => void;\n  onPinConversation: (id: string, pinned: boolean) => void;\n  onOpenSettings: () => void;\n  onThemeChange: (theme: ThemeName) => Promise<void>;\n  onCollapse: () => void;\n}\n\nexport function Sidebar({\n  state,\n  selectedConversationId,\n  activeProvider,\n  busy,\n  collapsed,\n  theme,\n  onNewConversation,\n  onSelectConversation,\n  onDeleteConversation,\n  onPinConversation,\n  onOpenSettings,\n  onThemeChange,\n  onCollapse\n}: SidebarProps) {\n  const conversations = state?.conversations ?? [];\n  const pinnedConversations = conversations.filter((conversation) => conversation.pinned);\n  const recentConversations = conversations.filter((conversation) => !conversation.pinned);\n  const [openMenuId, setOpenMenuId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const switchToMode = themeMode(theme) === \"dark\" ? \"light\" : \"dark\";\n\n  return (\n    <aside\n      className={[\n        \"sidebar-shell sidebar-drawer fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-40 w-[min(88vw,320px)] border-r border-[var(--line)] md:sticky md:top-0 md:z-auto md:h-dvh md:w-[320px]\",\n        collapsed ? \"sidebar-drawer-collapsed\" : \"\"\n      ].join(\" \")}\n      aria-hidden={collapsed}\n    >\n      <div className=\"flex h-full min-h-0 flex-col gap-4 p-4 sm:gap-5 sm:p-5\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between gap-3\">\n          <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-base font-semibold\">rafael</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"mt-1 truncate text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\"\n              title={providerConnectionTitle(activeProvider)}\n            >\n              {providerConnectionLabel(activeProvider)}\n            </p>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <button\n              type=\"button\"\n              className=\"icon-button icon-button-subtle\"\n              aria-label=\"Collapse sidebar\"\n              title=\"Collapse sidebar\"\n              onClick={onCollapse}\n            >\n              <PanelLeftClose aria-hidden=\"true\" size={17} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n            </button>\n            <button\n              type=\"button\"\n              className=\"icon-button icon-button-subtle\"\n              aria-label={`Switch to ${switchToMode} mode`}\n              title={`Switch to ${switchToMode} mode`}\n              onClick={() => void onThemeChange(toggledTheme(theme)).catch(() => undefined)}\n            >\n              {switchToMode === \"light\" ? (\n                <Sun aria-hidden=\"true\" size={17} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n              ) : (\n                <Moon aria-hidden=\"true\" size={17} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n              )}\n            </button>\n            <button\n              type=\"button\"\n              className=\"icon-button icon-button-subtle\"\n              aria-label=\"New conversation\"\n              title=\"New conversation\"\n              disabled={busy}\n              onClick={onNewConversation}\n            >\n              <Plus aria-hidden=\"true\" size={17} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <button\n          type=\"button\"\n          className=\"sidebar-settings-button inline-flex w-full items-center gap-2\"\n          onClick={onOpenSettings}\n        >\n          <Settings aria-hidden=\"true\" size={15} strokeWidth={2.1} />\n          Settings\n        </button>\n\n        <div className=\"min-h-0 flex-1 overflow-y-auto pb-4\">\n          {pinnedConversations.length > 0 ? (\n            <ConversationSection\n              label=\"Pinned\"\n              conversations={pinnedConversations}\n              selectedConversationId={selectedConversationId}\n              busy={busy}\n              openMenuId={openMenuId}\n              onSelectConversation={onSelectConversation}\n              onDeleteConversation={onDeleteConversation}\n              onPinConversation={onPinConversation}\n              onMenuToggle={(id) => setOpenMenuId(openMenuId === id ? null : id)}\n              onMenuClose={() => setOpenMenuId(null)}\n            />\n          ) : null}\n          <ConversationSection\n            label={pinnedConversations.length > 0 ? \"Recent\" : \"Conversations\"}\n            conversations={recentConversations}\n            selectedConversationId={selectedConversationId}\n            busy={busy}\n            openMenuId={openMenuId}\n            onSelectConversation={onSelectConversation}\n            onDeleteConversation={onDeleteConversation}\n            onPinConversation={onPinConversation}\n            onMenuToggle={(id) => setOpenMenuId(openMenuId === id ? null : id)}\n            onMenuClose={() => setOpenMenuId(null)}\n          />\n          {conversations.length === 0 ? (\n            <p className=\"rounded-md border border-dashed border-[var(--line)] px-3 py-4 text-sm text-[var(--muted)]\">\n              Nothing saved yet.\n            </p>\n          ) : null}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </aside>\n  );\n}\n\ninterface ConversationSectionProps {\n  label: string;\n  conversations: ConversationSummary[];\n  selectedConversationId: string | null;\n  busy: boolean;\n  openMenuId: string | null;\n  onSelectConversation: (id: string) => void;\n  onDeleteConversation: (id: string) => void;\n  onPinConversation: (id: string, pinned: boolean) => void;\n  onMenuToggle: (id: string) => void;\n  onMenuClose: () => void;\n}\n\nfunction ConversationSection({\n  label,\n  conversations,\n  selectedConversationId,\n  busy,\n  openMenuId,\n  onSelectConversation,\n  onDeleteConversation,\n  onPinConversation,\n  onMenuToggle,\n  onMenuClose\n}: ConversationSectionProps) {\n  if (conversations.length === 0) {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <section className=\"mb-5 grid gap-2\">\n      <span className=\"control-label\">{label}</span>\n      {conversations.map((conversation) => (\n        <ConversationButton\n          key={conversation.id}\n          conversation={conversation}\n          selected={conversation.id === selectedConversationId}\n          disabled={busy}\n          onSelect={onSelectConversation}\n          onDelete={onDeleteConversation}\n          onPin={onPinConversation}\n          menuOpen={openMenuId === conversation.id}\n          onMenuToggle={onMenuToggle}\n          onMenuClose={onMenuClose}\n        />\n      ))}\n    </section>\n  );\n}\n\ninterface ConversationButtonProps {\n  conversation: ConversationSummary;\n  selected: boolean;\n  disabled: boolean;\n  menuOpen: boolean;\n  onSelect: (id: string) => void;\n  onDelete: (id: string) => void;\n  onPin: (id: string, pinned: boolean) => void;\n  onMenuToggle: (id: string) => void;\n  onMenuClose: () => void;\n}\n\nfunction ConversationButton({\n  conversation,\n  selected,\n  disabled,\n  menuOpen,\n  onSelect,\n  onDelete,\n  onPin,\n  onMenuToggle,\n  onMenuClose\n}: ConversationButtonProps) {\n  const [confirmingDelete, setConfirmingDelete] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!menuOpen) {\n      setConfirmingDelete(false);\n    }\n  }, [menuOpen]);\n\n  return (\n    <div\n      className={[\n        \"conversation-row group relative grid grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_32px] items-center gap-1 rounded-md transition-colors\",\n        selected ? \"conversation-row-selected\" : \"\"\n      ].join(\" \")}\n    >\n      <button\n        type=\"button\"\n        className=\"min-w-0 px-2.5 py-2 text-left\"\n        disabled={disabled}\n        onClick={() => onSelect(conversation.id)}\n      >\n        <span className=\"flex min-w-0 items-center gap-1.5\">\n          {conversation.pinned ? (\n            <Pin\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              size={13}\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              className=\"shrink-0 text-[var(--accent)]\"\n            />\n          ) : null}\n          <span className=\"block truncate text-sm font-medium\">{conversation.title}</span>\n        </span>\n        <span className=\"block text-xs text-[var(--muted)]\">\n          {conversation.messageCount} messages\n        </span>\n      </button>\n      <button\n        type=\"button\"\n        className=\"conversation-action-button mr-1 inline-flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded\"\n        disabled={disabled}\n        aria-label={`Open ${conversation.title} actions`}\n        aria-expanded={menuOpen}\n        onClick={() => onMenuToggle(conversation.id)}\n      >\n        <MoreVertical aria-hidden=\"true\" size={15} strokeWidth={2} />\n      </button>\n      {menuOpen ? (\n        <div className=\"conversation-menu absolute right-1 top-9 z-10 min-w-32 rounded-md border border-[var(--line)] bg-[var(--panel)] p-1 shadow-[var(--shadow-soft)]\">\n          {confirmingDelete ? (\n            <div className=\"conversation-delete-confirm\">\n              <p>Delete this chat?</p>\n              <div className=\"conversation-confirm-actions\">\n                <button\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  className=\"conversation-confirm-button\"\n                  disabled={disabled}\n                  onClick={() => setConfirmingDelete(false)}\n                >\n                  Cancel\n                </button>\n                <button\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  className=\"conversation-confirm-button conversation-confirm-button-danger\"\n                  disabled={disabled}\n                  onClick={() => {\n                    onDelete(conversation.id);\n                    setConfirmingDelete(false);\n                    onMenuClose();\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Delete\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <button\n                type=\"button\"\n                className=\"conversation-menu-item\"\n                disabled={disabled}\n                onClick={() => {\n                  onPin(conversation.id, !conversation.pinned);\n                  onMenuClose();\n                }}\n              >\n                {conversation.pinned ? (\n                  <PinOff aria-hidden=\"true\" size={14} strokeWidth={2} />\n                ) : (\n                  <Pin aria-hidden=\"true\" size={14} strokeWidth={2} />\n",

## Assistant

Yes. I have the repo context, but I need the live workstation state to verify the current invocation.

Please run this on your machine that can SSH to `rafael` and paste the output, redacting any tokens/API keys:

```bash
ssh rafael '
echo "== host =="
hostnamectl --static 2>/dev/null || hostname

echo "== user llama-server unit =="
systemctl --user cat llama-server.service 2>&1 || true

echo "== user llama-server state =="
systemctl --user show llama-server.service \
  -p ActiveState -p SubState -p FragmentPath -p DropInPaths -p ExecStart -p Environment 2>&1 || true

echo "== user rafael-chat unit =="
systemctl --user cat rafael-chat.service 2>&1 || true

echo "== running llama processes =="
pgrep -af "llama-server|llama-swap" || true

echo "== listener on 8080 =="
ss -ltnp "( sport = :8080 )" 2>/dev/null || true

echo "== current /v1/models =="
curl -fsS --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/models 2>&1 || true

echo "== llama-swap availability =="
command -v llama-swap || true
llama-swap --version 2>&1 || true
'
```

What I’ve learned so far from the repo:

- Current checked-in `llama-server.service` directly starts `llama-server` on port `8080`.
- `rafael-chat.service` points at `http://rafael:8080/v1` and a single default model.
- Chat already has a provider abstraction and sends the selected provider/model to the OpenAI-compatible backend.
- It does not yet discover models from `/v1/models`; provider/model entries are persisted in `data/chat/config.json`.

Likely plan after confirmation: replace the direct llama-server unit with a `llama-swap` user service, add a YAML config with all heavy models in one mutually exclusive swap group plus TTL, point chat at the proxy, and update chat so `/v1/models` from llama-swap becomes the dropdown source of truth. The main tradeoff is that `llama-swap` is less systemd-native than template units, but it gives us lazy load, idle unload, hot-swap, and model enumeration without building that lifecycle layer ourselves.

# /home/cachebag/.config/systemd/user/llama-server.service -> /home/cachebag/rafael/infra/systemd/llama-server.service
# Configuration is done via environment variables.
# Override defaults by creating a drop-in file:
#
#   ~/.config/systemd/user/llama-server.service.d/override.conf
#
# With contents like:
#
#   [Service]
#   Environment=LLAMA_MODEL=bartowski/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M
#   Environment=LLAMA_HOST=127.0.0.1
#   Environment=LLAMA_PORT=8080
#   Environment=LLAMA_CTX=8192
#   Environment=LLAMA_GPU_LAYERS=999
#   Environment=LLAMA_INSTALL_DIR=%h/src/llama.cpp
#
# Or run: systemctl --user edit llama-server
#
[Unit]
Description=llama.cpp server
After=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple

Environment=LLAMA_INSTALL_DIR=%h/src/llama.cpp
Environment=LLAMA_MODEL=Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M
Environment=LLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0
Environment=LLAMA_PORT=8080
Environment=LLAMA_CTX=16384
Environment=LLAMA_GPU_LAYERS=999

WorkingDirectory=%h/src/llama.cpp
Environment=PATH=/opt/cuda/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
Environment=LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/cuda/lib64

Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target

## Assistant

I have the live `rafael` details now. The active setup is exactly the direct `llama-server` unit from the repo, bound to `0.0.0.0:8080`, with `Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M`; `llama-swap` is not installed on the workstation.Got it. Live `rafael` confirms:

- `llama-server.service` is active and symlinked to the repo unit.
- Current command is `llama-server -hf Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 -c 16384 -ngl 999`.
- `rafael-chat` points at `http://rafael:8080/v1`.
- `llama-swap` is not installed yet.

**Plan**
1. Add a `llama-swap` YAML config with model IDs `qwen3-coder`, `gpt-oss`, and `qwen-coder-fim`; each launches `~/src/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server` on `${PORT}`.
2. Put all three in one llama-swap group with `swap: true` and `exclusive: true`, plus `ttl`/`globalTTL` around 600s. This is the enforcement that only one model is resident.
3. Add a `llama-swap.service` user unit listening on `0.0.0.0:8080`; document disabling `llama-server.service` before enabling it.
4. Update `rafael-chat.service`/docs to depend on `llama-swap.service` and keep the same base URL.
5. Update chat so llama-swap’s `/v1/models` drives the model/provider dropdown instead of only the persisted `data/chat/config.json`.
6. Document install/ops: llama-swap binary requirement, status/log commands, model add-one-block flow, and each llama-server flag.

**Tradeoffs**
- `llama-swap` is the pragmatic fit: it already supports lazy load, TTL unload, `/v1/models`, and swap behavior. Its docs describe `ttl`, `${PORT}`, and groups with `swap`/`exclusive` for mutual exclusion.
- The systemd-template alternative is cleaner from a systemd purity angle, but we would have to build idle unload, request routing, model enumeration, and swap sequencing ourselves.
- First request after idle will block while the model loads. The current chat timeout is `300s`; I may bump it or document tuning if the 35B MoE load can exceed that.
- If `qwen-coder-fim` is autocomplete-only, putting it in `/v1/models` means chat can select it unless we mark it `unlisted` or add UI filtering. My default would be to list it because you asked to seed all three.

Sources checked for llama-swap behavior: [README](https://github.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap) and [configuration docs](https://github.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap/blob/main/docs/configuration.md).

Confirm and I’ll make the repo changes.

base_url.into(),\n            model: model.into(),\n            timeout: None,\n            authorization: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_timeout(mut self, timeout: Duration) -> Self {\n        self.timeout = Some(timeout);\n        self\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_bearer_token(mut self, token: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        self.authorization = bearer(token: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            value: SecretString::new(format!(\"Bearer {}\", token.into())),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn raw(value: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            value: SecretString::new(value),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn expose_value(&self) -> &str {\n        self.value.expose_secret()\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Clone)]\npub struct LocalModelClient {\n    http: Client,\n    base_url: String,\n    model: String,\n    authorization: Option<AuthorizationHeader>,\n}\n\nimpl LocalModelClient {\n    pub fn new(config: ModelClientConfig) -> Result<Self, ClientError> {\n        let mut builder = Client::builder();\n        if let Some(timeout) = config.timeout {\n            builder = builder.timeout(timeout);\n        }\n\n        Ok(Self {\n            http: builder.build().map_err(ClientError::BuildHttp)?,\n            base_url: config.base_url.trim_end_matches('/').to_owned(),\n            model: config.model,\n            authorization: config.authorization,\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_http_client(config: ModelClientConfig, http: Client) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            http,\n            base_url: config.base_url.trim_end_matches('/').to_owned(),\n            model: config.model,\n            authorization: config.authorization,\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub async fn chat(&self, request: ChatRequest) -> Result<ChatCompletion, ClientError> {\n        let mut http_request = self\n            .http\n            .post(format!(\"{}/chat/completions\", self.base_url))\n            .json(&ChatCompletionsRequestBody {\n                model: &self.model,\n                messages: &request.messages,\n                temperature: request.options.temperature,\n                max_tokens: request.options.max_tokens,\n                stream: false,\n                response_format: request.options.response_format,\n            });\n\n        if let Some(authorization) = &self.authorization {\n            http_request = http_request.header(AUTHORIZATION, authorization.expose_value());\n        }\n\n        let response = http_request\n            .send()\n            .await\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?\n            .error_for_status()\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?\n            .json::<ChatCompletionsResponse>()\n            .await\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?;\n\n        let choice = response\n            .choices\n            .into_iter()\n            .next()\n            .ok_or(ClientError::NoChoices)?;\n        Ok(ChatCompletion {\n            content: choice.message.content,\n            finish_reason: choice.finish_reason,\n            usage: response.usage,\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub async fn chat_stream<F>(\n        &self,\n        request: ChatRequest,\n        mut on_delta: F,\n    ) -> Result<ChatCompletion, ClientError>\n    where\n        F: FnMut(&str),\n    {\n        let mut http_request = self\n            .http\n            .post(format!(\"{}/chat/completions\", self.base_url))\n            .json(&ChatCompletionsRequestBody {\n                model: &self.model,\n                messages: &request.messages,\n                temperature: request.options.temperature,\n                max_tokens: request.options.max_tokens,\n                stream: true,\n                response_format: request.options.response_format,\n            });\n\n        if let Some(authorization) = &self.authorization {\n            http_request = http_request.header(AUTHORIZATION, authorization.expose_value());\n        }\n\n        let mut stream = http_request\n            .send()\n            .await\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?\n            .error_for_status()\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?\n            .bytes_stream();\n\n        let mut buffer = String::new();\n        let mut content = String::new();\n        let mut finish_reason = None;\n        let mut usage = None;\n\n        while let Some(chunk) = stream.next().await {\n            let chunk = chunk.map_err(ClientError::Http)?;\n            buffer.push_str(std::str::from_utf8(&chunk)?);\n\n            while let Some(line_end) = buffer.find('\\n') {\n                let line = buffer[..line_end].trim_end_matches('\\r').to_owned();\n                buffer.drain(..=line_end);\n\n                let Some(data) = line.strip_prefix(\"data:\") else {\n                    continue;\n                };\n                let data = data.trim();\n                if data.is_empty() {\n                    continue;\n                }\n                if data == \"[DONE]\" {\n                    return Ok(ChatCompletion {\n                        content,\n                        finish_reason,\n                        usage,\n                    });\n                }\n\n                let chunk = serde_json::from_str::<ChatCompletionsStreamResponse>(data)?;\n                if let Some(next_usage) = chunk.usage {\n                    usage = Some(next_usage);\n                }\n\n                for choice in chunk.choices {\n                    if let Some(next_finish_reason) = choice.finish_reason {\n                        finish_reason = Some(next_finish_reason);\n                    }\n                    if let Some(delta) = choice.delta.content {\n                        content.push_str(&delta);\n                        on_delta(&delta);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        Ok(ChatCompletion {\n            content,\n            finish_reason,\n            usage,\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub async fn complete_text(\n        &self,\n        system: impl Into<String>,\n        user: impl Into<String>,\n        options: ChatOptions,\n    ) -> Result<String, ClientError> {\n        Ok(self\n            .chat(\n                ChatRequest::new(vec![ChatMessage::system(system), ChatMessage::user(user)])\n                    .with_options(options),\n            )\n            .await?\n            .content)\n    }\n\n    pub async fn complete_json<T>(\n        &self,\n        system: impl Into<String>,\n        user: impl Into<String>,\n        options: ChatOptions,\n    ) -> Result<T, ClientError>\n    where\n        T: DeserializeOwned,\n",

Serialize, de::DeserializeOwned};\nuse thiserror::Error;\n\n#[derive(Debug, Error)]\npub enum ClientError {\n    #[error(\"failed to build http client: {0}\")]\n    BuildHttp(#[source] reqwest::Error),\n    #[error(\"failed to call model endpoint: {0}\")]\n    Http(#[source] reqwest::Error),\n    #[error(\"model endpoint returned no choices\")]\n    NoChoices,\n    #[error(\"model response did not contain json\")]\n    NoJson,\n    #[error(\"failed to parse json model output: {0}\")]\n    Json(#[from] serde_json::Error),\n    #[error(\"model stream returned invalid utf8: {0}\")]\n    Utf8(#[from] std::str::Utf8Error),\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ModelClientConfig {\n    pub base_url: String,\n    pub model: String,\n    pub timeout: Option<Duration>,\n    pub authorization: Option<AuthorizationHeader>,\n}\n\nimpl ModelClientConfig {\n    pub fn new(base_url: impl Into<String>, model: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            base_url: base_url.into(),\n            model: model.into(),\n            timeout: None,\n            authorization: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_timeout(mut self, timeout: Duration) -> Self {\n        self.timeout = Some(timeout);\n        self\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_bearer_token(mut self, token: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        self.authorization = Some(AuthorizationHeader::bearer(token));\n        self\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_authorization(mut self, authorization: AuthorizationHeader) -> Self {\n        self.authorization = Some(authorization);\n        self\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]\npub struct AuthorizationHeader {\n    value: SecretString,\n}\n\nimpl AuthorizationHeader {\n    pub fn bearer(token: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            value: SecretString::new(format!(\"Bearer {}\", token.into())),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn raw(value: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            value: SecretString::new(value),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn expose_value(&self) -> &str {\n        self.value.expose_secret()\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Clone)]\npub struct LocalModelClient {\n    http: Client,\n    base_url: String,\n    model: String,\n    authorization: Option<AuthorizationHeader>,\n}\n\nimpl LocalModelClient {\n    pub fn new(config: ModelClientConfig) -> Result<Self, ClientError> {\n        let mut builder = Client::builder();\n        if let Some(timeout) = config.timeout {\n            builder = builder.timeout(timeout);\n        }\n\n        Ok(Self {\n            http: builder.build().map_err(ClientError::BuildHttp)?,\n            base_url: config.base_url.trim_end_matches('/').to_owned(),\n            model: config.model,\n            authorization: config.authorization,\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_http_client(config: ModelClientConfig, http: Client) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            http,\n            base_url: config.base_url.trim_end_matches('/').to_owned(),\n            model: config.model,\n            authorization: config.authorization,\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub async fn chat(&self, request: ChatRequest) -> Result<ChatCompletion, ClientError> {\n        let mut http_request = self\n            .http\n            .post(format!(\"{}/chat/completions\", self.base_url))\n            .json(&ChatCompletionsRequestBody {\n                model: &self.model,\n                messages: &request.messages,\n                temperature: request.options.temperature,\n                max_tokens: request.options.max_tokens,\n                stream: false,\n                response_format: request.options.response_format,\n            });\n\n        if let Some(authorization) = &self.authorization {\n            http_request = http_request.header(AUTHORIZATION, authorization.expose_value());\n        }\n\n        let response = http_request\n            .send()\n            .await\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?\n            .error_for_status()\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?\n            .json::<ChatCompletionsResponse>()\n            .await\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?;\n\n        let choice = response\n            .choices\n            .into_iter()\n            .next()\n            .ok_or(ClientError::NoChoices)?;\n        Ok(ChatCompletion {\n            content: choice.message.content,\n            finish_reason: choice.finish_reason,\n            usage: response.usage,\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub async fn chat_stream<F>(\n        &self,\n        request: ChatRequest,\n        mut on_delta: F,\n    ) -> Result<ChatCompletion, ClientError>\n    where\n        F: FnMut(&str),\n    {\n        let mut http_request = self\n            .http\n            .post(format!(\"{}/chat/completions\", self.base_url))\n            .json(&ChatCompletionsRequestBody {\n                model: &self.model,\n                messages: &request.messages,\n                temperature: request.options.temperature,\n                max_tokens: request.options.max_tokens,\n                stream: true,\n                response_format: request.options.response_format,\n http_request\n            .send()\n            .await\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?\n            .error_for_status()\n            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?\n            .bytes_stream();\n\n        let mut buffer = String::new();\n        let mut content = String::new();\n        let mut finish_reason = None;\n        let mut usage = None;\n\n        while let Some(chunk) = stream.next().await {\n            let chunk = chunk.map_err(ClientError::Http)?;\n            buffer.push_str(std::str::from_utf8(&chunk)?);\n\n            while let Some(line_end) = buffer.find('\\n') {\n                let line = buffer[..line_end].trim_end_matches('\\r').to_owned();\n                buffer.drain(..=line_end);\n\n                let Some(data) = line.strip_prefix(\"data:\") else {\n                    continue;\n                };\n                let data = data.trim();\n                if data.is_empty() {\n                    continue;\n {\n                    usage = Some(next_usage);\n                }\n\n                for choice in chunk.choices {\n                    if let Some(next_finish_reason) = choice.finish_reason {\n content.push_str(&delta);\n                        on_delta(&delta);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        Ok(ChatCompletion {\n            content,\n            finish_reason,\n            usage,\n        })\n    }\n\n    pub async fn complete_text(\n        &self,\n        system: impl Into<String>,\n        user: impl Into<String>,\n        options: ChatOptions,\n    ) -> Result<String, ClientError> {\n        Ok(self\n            .chat(\n                ChatRequest::new(vec![ChatMessage::system(system), ChatMessage::user(user)])\n                    .with_options(options),\n            )\n            .await?\n            .content)\n    }\n\n    pub async fn complete_json<T>(\n        &self,\n        system: impl Into<String>,\n        user: ## Assistant

The chat service uses a small local `client` crate for OpenAI-compatible calls, so I’ll extend that crate with a `/models` reader instead of adding separate HTTP code in the chat backend. Then the server can merge discovered local models with any saved non-local providers.I’m adding the llama-swap service/config first. The config will keep every local model in one `swap: true`, `exclusive: true` group so even the lighter Gemma model participates in the same single-resident slot unless you later choose to split it out.

strip_markdown_fence(raw: &str) -> &str {\n    if !raw.starts_with(\"```\") {\n        return raw;\n    }\n    let Some((_, rest)) = raw.split_once('\\n') else {\n        return raw;\n    };\n    rest.trim().strip_suffix(\"```\").unwrap_or(rest).trim()\n}\n\nfn find_json_span(value: &str) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {\n    let start = value\n        .char_indices()\n        .find_map(|(index, ch)| matches!(ch, '{' | '[').then_some(index))?;\n    let mut stack = Vec::new();\n    let mut in_string = false;\n    let mut escaped = false;\n\n    for (offset, ch) in value[start..].char_indices() Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]\npub enum CommonError {\n    #[error(\"safe component must be non-empty\")]\n    EmptyComponent,\n    #[error(\"safe component `{value}` must not be `.` or `..`\")]\n    DotComponent { value: String },\n    #[error(\"safe component `{value}` must not contain path separators\")]\n    ComponentContainsSeparator { value: String },\n    #[error(\"safe component must not contain NUL bytes\")]\n    ComponentContainsNul,\n    #[error(\"invalid boolean value `{value}`\")]\n    InvalidBool { value: String },\n}\n\n#[derive(Clone, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]\npub struct SafeComponent(String);\n\nimpl SafeComponent {\n    pub fn parse(value: impl Into<String>) -> Result<Self, CommonError> {\n        let value = value.into();\n        if value.is_empty() {\n            return Err(CommonError::EmptyComponent);\n        }\n        if value == \".\" || value == \"..\" {\n            return Err(CommonError::DotComponent { value });\n        }\n        if value.contains('\\0') {\n            return Err(CommonError::ComponentContainsNul);\n        }\n        if value.contains('/') || value.contains('\\\\') {\n            return Err(CommonError::ComponentContainsSeparator { value });\n        }\n\n        Ok(Self(value))\n    }\n\n    pub fn as_str(&self) -> &str {\n        &self.0\n    }\n\n    pub fn into_string(self) -> String {\n        self.0\n    }\n}\n\nimpl fmt::Debug for SafeComponent {\n    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {\n        f.debug_tuple(\"SafeComponent\").field(&self.0).finish()\n    }\n}\n\nimpl fmt::Display for SafeComponent {\n    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {\n        f.write_str(&self.0)\n    }\n}\n\nimpl FromStr for SafeComponent {\n    type Err = CommonError;\n\n    fn from_str(value: &str) -> Result<Self, Self::Err> {\n        Self::parse(value)\n    }\n}\n\nimpl Serialize for SafeComponent {\n    fn serialize<S>(&self, serializer: S) -> Result<S::Ok, S::Error>\n    where\n        S: Serializer,\n    {\n        serializer.serialize_str(&self.0)\n SecretString(String);\n\nimpl SecretString {\n    pub fn new(value: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        Self(value.into())\n    }\n\n    pub fn expose_secret(&self) -> &str {\n        &self.0\n    }\n\n    pub fn into_secret(self) -> String {\n        self.0\n    }\n}\n\nimpl fmt::Debug for SecretString {\n    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {\n        f.write_str(\"SecretString(<redacted>)\")\n    }\n}\n\nimpl fmt::Display for SecretString {\n    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {\n        f.write_str(\"<redacted>\")\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TruncatedText {\n    pub text: String,\n    pub original_bytes: usize,\n    pub truncated: bool,\n}\n\npub fn truncate_utf8(value: &str, max_bytes: usize) -> TruncatedText {\n    if value.len() <= max_bytes {\n        return TruncatedText {\n            text: value.to_owned(),\n            original_bytes: value.len(),\n            truncated: false,\n        };\n    }\n\n    let mut end = max_bytes;\n    while end > 0 && !value.is_char_boundary(end) {\n        end -= 1;\n    }\n\n    TruncatedText {\n        text: value[..end].to_owned(),\n        original_bytes: value.len(),\n        truncated: true,\n    }\n}\n\npub fn parse_bool(value: &str) -> Result<bool, CommonError> {\n    match value.trim().to_ascii_lowercase().as_str() {\n        \"1\" | \"true\" | \"yes\" | \"y\" | \"on\" => Ok(true),\n        \"0\" | \"false\" | \"no\" | \"n\" | \"off\" => Ok(false),\n        _ => Err(CommonError::InvalidBool {\n            value: value.to_owned(),\n        }),\n    }\n}\n\npub fn split_delimited(value: &str, delimiters: &[char]) -> Vec<String> {\n    value\n        .split(|ch| delimiters.contains(&ch))\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|part| !part.is_empty())\n        .map(str::to_owned)\n        .collect()\n}\n\npub fn dedupe_preserving_order<T>(items: impl IntoIterator<Item = T>) -> Vec<T>\nwhere\n    T: Clone + Eq + Hash,\n{\n    let mut seen = HashSet::new();\n    let mut deduped = Vec::new();\n\n    for item in items {\n        if seen.insert(item.clone()) {\n            deduped.push(item);\n        }\n    }\n\n    deduped\n}\n\npub fn slugify(value: &str, max_len: usize, fallback: &str) -> String {\n    let mut slug = String::new();\n    let mut last_was_dash = false;\n\n    for ch in value.chars().flat_map(char::to_lowercase) {\n        if ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() {\n            slug.push(ch);\n            last_was_dash = false;\n        } else if !last_was_dash && !slug.is_empty() {\n            slug.push('-');\n            last_was_dash = true;\n        }\n\n        if slug.len() >= max_len {\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n\n    let slug = slug.trim_matches('-');\n    if slug.is_empty() {\n        fallback.to_owned()\n    } else {\n        slug.to_owned()\n    }\n}\n\npub fn looks_sensitive_name(name: &str) -> bool {\n    let upper = name.to_ascii_uppercase();\n    upper.contains(\"TOKEN\")\n        || upper.contains(\"SECRET\")\n        || upper.contains(\"PASSWORD\")\n truncate_utf8(value: &str, max_bytes: usize) -> TruncatedText {\n    if value.len() <= max_bytes {\n        return TruncatedText {\n            text: value.to_owned(),\n            original_bytes: ```

## Assistant

I’m also changing the chat backend to fall back cleanly: if `/v1/models` is reachable, discovered models replace stale saved local entries; if it is not reachable, the existing saved provider config still works. That makes the migration less brittle while `llama-swap` is being installed.

```
# Configuration is done in infra/systemd/llama-swap.yaml.
# The default expects the llama-swap binary at:
#
#   ~/.local/bin/llama-swap
#
# Override ExecStart if your install path differs:
#
#   systemctl --user edit llama-swap
#
[Unit]
Description=llama-swap model lifecycle proxy
After=network-online.target
Conflicts=llama-server.service

[Service]
Type=simple

Environment=LLAMA_SWAP_CONFIG=%h/rafael/infra/systemd/llama-swap.yaml
Environment=LLAMA_SWAP_LISTEN=0.0.0.0:8080
Environment=PATH=/opt/cuda/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:%h/.local/bin
Environment=LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/cuda/lib64

WorkingDirectory=%h/rafael
ExecStart=%h/.local/bin/llama-swap --config ${LLAMA_SWAP_CONFIG} --listen ${LLAMA_SWAP_LISTEN}

Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target

```
