```
# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap/refs/heads/main/config-schema.json
#
# llama-swap keeps the public OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080 and starts
# per-model llama-server processes on private ports beginning at startPort.
#
# Hardware policy for rafael:
# - RTX 4080 16GB VRAM, ~55GB RAM, Ryzen 7 5800X.
# - Only one local model should be resident at a time.
# - Every model below is in one swap group, so a request for model B unloads
#   model A before B starts.

healthCheckTimeout: 600
logLevel: info
logToStdout: both
startPort: 18080
globalTTL: 600
sendLoadingState: true
includeAliasesInList: false

macros:
  llama-server: "${env.HOME}/src/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server --host 127.0.0.1"

models:
  gemma-everyday:
    name: "Gemma Everyday"
    description: "Gemma 4 E4B instruction model for general family use, casual Q&A, recipes, workouts, and fast day-to-day chats."
    useModelName: "ggml-org/gemma-4-E4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M"
    ttl: 600
    cmd: |
      # -hf: download/load the GGUF directly from Hugging Face.
      # -ngl 999: offload all possible layers to the RTX 4080.
      # -c 32768: 32K context for everyday chats without excessive KV memory.
      # --jinja: use the model's tokenizer chat template.
      # --port ${PORT}: private llama-swap-assigned upstream port.
      # TODO: add --mmproj <projector.gguf> here if image/photo input is needed.
      ${llama-server}
      -hf ggml-org/gemma-4-E4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M
      -ngl 999
      -c 32768
      --jinja
      --port ${PORT}

  qwen3-coder:
    name: "Qwen3.6 Coder"
    description: "Qwen3.6 35B-A3B MoE model for daily coding and agentic work."
    useModelName: "unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-GGUF:Q4_K_M"
    ttl: 600
    cmd: |
      # -hf: download/load the GGUF directly from Hugging Face.
      # -ngl 999: offload all possible layers to the RTX 4080.
      # --n-cpu-moe 24: TODO tune with llama-bench for VRAM/RAM balance.
      # -c 65536: long coding/agent context.
      # -fa on: enable flash attention.
      # -ctk/-ctv q8_0: quantize KV cache to reduce memory pressure.
      # --jinja: use the model's tokenizer chat template.
      # --port ${PORT}: private llama-swap-assigned upstream port.
      ${llama-server}
      -hf unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-GGUF:Q4_K_M
      -ngl 999
      --n-cpu-moe 24
      -c 65536
      -fa on
      -ctk q8_0
      -ctv q8_0
      --jinja
      --port ${PORT}

  gpt-oss:
    name: "GPT-OSS 20B"
    description: "GPT-OSS 20B MoE model for research, reasoning, and reliability checks."
    useModelName: "ggml-org/gpt-oss-20b-GGUF"
    ttl: 600
    cmd: |
      # -hf: download/load the GGUF directly from Hugging Face.
      # --n-cpu-moe 12: offload MoE experts to system RAM.
      # -c 32768: 32K context.
      # --jinja: use the model's tokenizer chat template.
      # --port ${PORT}: private llama-swap-assigned upstream port.
      ${llama-server}
      -hf ggml-org/gpt-oss-20b-GGUF
      --n-cpu-moe 12
      -c 32768
      --jinja
      --port ${PORT}

  qwen-coder-fim:
    name: "Qwen2.5 Coder 14B"
    description: "Qwen2.5-Coder 14B instruction model for coding, fill-in-the-middle workflows, and day-to-day utility."
    useModelName: "Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M"
    ttl: 600
    cmd: |
      # -hf: download/load the GGUF directly from Hugging Face.
      # -ngl 999: offload all possible layers to the RTX 4080.
      # -c 32768: larger than the old 16K default while staying reasonable.
      # --jinja: use the model's tokenizer chat template.
      # --port ${PORT}: private llama-swap-assigned upstream port.
      ${llama-server}
      -hf Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M
      -ngl 999
      -c 32768
      --jinja
      --port ${PORT}

  gemma-deep:
    name: "Gemma Deep"
    description: "Gemma 4 26B-A4B MoE model for stronger general assistance while still using one swap slot."
    useModelName: "ggml-org/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M"
    ttl: 600
    cmd: |
      # -hf: download/load the GGUF directly from Hugging Face.
      # -ngl 999: offload all possible layers to the RTX 4080.
      # --n-cpu-moe 12: TODO tune with llama-bench for VRAM/RAM balance.
      # -c 32768: 32K context.
      # --jinja: use the model's tokenizer chat template.
      # --port ${PORT}: private llama-swap-assigned upstream port.
      ${llama-server}
      -hf ggml-org/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M
      -ngl 999
      --n-cpu-moe 12
      -c 32768
      --jinja
      --port ${PORT}

groups:
  local-models:
    swap: true
    exclusive: true
    members:
      - gemma-everyday
      - qwen3-coder
      - gpt-oss
      - qwen-coder-fim
      - gemma-deep

pub async fn list_models(
    provider: &StoredProvider,
    timeout: Duration,
) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<ModelInfo>> {
    match provider.kind {
        ProviderKind::OpenAiCompatible => {
            let client = LocalModelClient::new(model_client_config(provider, timeout))
                .context("failed to create model client")?;
            client
                .list_models()
                .await
                .context("model endpoint returned an error")
        }
        ProviderKind::Anthropic => Ok(Vec::new()),
    }
}

    pub async fn list_models(&self) -> Result<Vec<ModelInfo>, ClientError> {
        let mut http_request = self.http.get(format!("{}/models", self.base_url));

        if let Some(authorization) = &self.authorization {
            http_request = http_request.header(AUTHORIZATION, authorization.expose_value());
        }

        let response = http_request
            .send()
            .await
            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?
            .error_for_status()
            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?
            .json::<ModelsResponse>()
            .await
            .map_err(ClientError::Http)?;

        Ok(response.into_models())
    }

Diff: /home/cachebag/rafael/crates/client/src/lib.rs
```

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct ModelsResponse {
    #[serde(default)]
    data: Vec<ModelInfo>,
    #[serde(default)]
    models: Vec<LlamaCppModelInfo>,
}

impl ModelsResponse {
    fn into_models(self) -> Vec<ModelInfo> {
        if !self.data.is_empty() {
            return self.data;
        }

        self.models
            .into_iter()
            .filter_map(LlamaCppModelInfo::into_model)
            .collect()
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct LlamaCppModelInfo {
    #[serde(default)]
    name: Option<String>,
    #[serde(default)]
    model: Option<String>,
    #[serde(default)]
    description: Option<String>,
}

impl LlamaCppModelInfo {
    fn into_model(self) -> Option<ModelInfo> {
        let id = self
            .model
            .as_deref()
            .or(self.name.as_deref())
            .map(str::trim)
            .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())?
            .to_owned();

        Some(ModelInfo {
            id,
            name: self.name,
            description: self.description,
        })
    }
}

#[cfg(test)]

Diff: /home/cachebag/rafael/services/chat/src/server.rs
```
    }

    async fn runtime_providers(&self, config: &ChatConfigFile) -> Vec<StoredProvider> {
        match model::list_models(
            &self.config.default_provider,
            self.config.model_list_timeout,
        )
        .await
        {
            Ok(models) if !models.is_empty() => {
                let mut providers = config
                    .providers
                    .iter()
                    .filter(|provider| !same_openai_endpoint(provider, &self.config.default_provider))
                    .cloned()
                    .collect::<Vec<_>>();
                providers.extend(discovered_providers(
                    &self.config.default_provider,
                    models,
                ));
                providers
            }
            Ok(_) => config.providers.clone(),
            Err(err) => {
                warn!(
                    base_url = %self.config.default_provider.base_url,
                    error = %err,
                    "failed to discover model list; using saved providers"
                );
                config.providers.clone()
            }
        }
    }
}

fn discovered_providers(source: &StoredProvider, models: Vec<ModelInfo>) -> Vec<StoredProvider> {
    let mut providers = Vec::new();

    for model in models {
        let model_id = model.id.trim();
        if model_id.is_empty() {
            continue;
        }

        let id = provider_id_for_model(model_id, &providers);
        let name = model
            .name
            .as_deref()
            .map(str::trim)
            .filter(|value| !value.is_empty() && *value != model_id)
            .unwrap_or(model_id)
            .to_owned();

        providers.push(StoredProvider {
            id,
            name,
            kind: ProviderKind::OpenAiCompatible,
            base_url: source.base_url.clone(),
            model: model_id.to_owned(),
            api_key: source.api_key.clone(),
            system_prompt: source.system_prompt.clone(),
        });
    }

    providers
}

fn provider_id_for_model(model_id: &str, existing: &[StoredProvider]) -> String {
    let base = if SafeComponent::parse(model_id.to_owned()).is_ok() {
        model_id.to_owned()
    } else {
        slugify(model_id, 64, "model")
    };

    if !existing.iter().any(|provider| provider.id == base) {
        return base;
    }

    let mut index = 2;
    loop {
        let candidate = format!("{base}-{index}");
        if !existing.iter().any(|provider| provider.id == candidate) {
            return candidate;
        }
        index += 1;
    }
}

fn same_openai_endpoint(left: &StoredProvider, right: &StoredProvider) -> bool {
    left.kind == ProviderKind::OpenAiCompatible
        && right.kind == ProviderKind::OpenAiCompatible
        && normalize_base_url(&left.base_url) == normalize_base_url(&right.base_url)
}

fn normalize_base_url(value: &str) -> String {
    value.trim().trim_end_matches('/').to_owned()
}

fn active_provider_id(
    config: &ChatConfigFile,
    providers: &[StoredProvider],
    default_provider: &StoredProvider,
) -> String {
    if providers
        .iter()
        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)
    {
        return config.settings.active_provider_id.clone();
    }

    if providers
        .iter()
        .any(|provider| provider.id == default_provider.model)
    {
        return default_provider.model.clone();
    }

    providers
        .first()
        .map(|provider| provider.id.clone())
        .unwrap_or_else(|| config.settings.active_provider_id.clone())
}

```

de::DeserializeOwned};\nuse thiserror::Error;\n\n#[derive(Debug, Error)]\npub enum ClientError {\n    #[error(\"failed to build http client: {0}\")]\n    BuildHttp(#[source] reqwest::Error),\n    #[error(\"failed to call model endpoint: {0}\")]\n    Http(#[source] reqwest::Error),\n    #[error(\"model endpoint returned no choices\")]\n    NoChoices,\n    #[error(\"model response did not contain json\")]\n    NoJson,\n    #[error(\"failed to parse json model output: {0}\")]\n    Json(#[from] serde_json::Error),\n    #[error(\"model stream returned invalid utf8: {0}\")]\n    Utf8(#[from] std::str::Utf8Error),\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ModelClientConfig {\n    pub base_url: String,\n    pub model: String,\n    pub timeout: Option<Duration>,\n    pub authorization: Option<AuthorizationHeader>,\n}\n\nimpl ModelClientConfig {\n    pub fn new(base_url: impl Into<String>, model: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            base_url: base_url.into(),\n            model: model.into(),\n            timeout: None,\n            authorization: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_timeout(mut self, timeout: Duration) -> Self {\n        self.timeout = Some(timeout);\n        self\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_bearer_token(mut self, token: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        self.authorization = Some(AuthorizationHeader::bearer(token));\n        self\n    }\n\n    pub fn with_authorization(mut self, authorization: AuthorizationHeader) -> Self {\n        self.authorization = Some(authorization);\n        self\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]\npub struct AuthorizationHeader {\n    value: SecretString,\n}\n\nimpl AuthorizationHeader {\n    pub fn bearer(token: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            value: SecretString::new(format!(\"Bearer {}\", token.into())),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn raw(value: impl Into<String>) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            value: SecretString::new(value),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub fn expose_value(&self) -> &str {\n        self.value.expose_secret()\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Clone)]\npub struct LocalModelClient {\n    http: Client,\n    base_url: String,\n    model: String,\n    authorization: Option<AuthorizationHeader>,\n}\n\nimpl LocalModelClient {\n    pub fn new(config: ModelClientConfig) -> Result<Self, ClientError> {\n        let mut builder = Client::builder();\n        if let Some(timeout) = config.timeout {\n            builder =   "stdout": "use std::{convert::Infallible, sync::Arc};\n\nuse axum::{\n    Json, Router,\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::StatusCode,\n    response::{\n        IntoResponse, Response,\n        sse::{Event, KeepAlive, Sse},\n    },\n    routing::{get, patch, post},\n};\nuse chrono::Utc;\nuse client::ModelInfo;\nuse common::{SafeComponent, slugify};\nuse serde::Serialize;\nuse tokio::{\n    net::TcpListener,\n    sync::{Mutex, mpsc},\n};\nuse tokio_stream::{StreamExt, wrappers::UnboundedReceiverStream};\nuse tower_http::services::{ServeDir, ServeFile};\nuse tracing::{info, warn};\n\nuse crate::{\n    config::AppConfig,\n    model,\n    store::{ChatStore, clean_optional, new_id},\n    types::{\n        ChatConfigFile, ChatMessageRecord, ChatRole, ChatStateResponse, Conversation,\n        CreateConversationRequest, PublicProvider, SaveProviderRequest, SendMessageRequest,\n        StoredProvider, UpdateConversationRequest, UpdateSettingsRequest,\n    },\n};\n\n#[derive(Clone)]\nstruct ServerState {\n    config: AppConfig,\n    store: ChatStore,\n    writes: Arc<Mutex<()>>,\n}\n\npub async fn serve(config: AppConfig) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let store = ChatStore::new(config.data_dir.clone());\n    let state = ServerState {\n        config: config.clone(),\n        store,\n        writes: Arc::new(Mutex::new(())),\n    };\n\n    state\n        .store\n        .load_or_initialize_config(&state.config.default_provider)\n        .await?;\n\n    let api = Router::new()\n        .route(\"/state\", get(get_state))\n        .route(\"/providers\", post(save_provider))\n        .route(\"/settings\", patch(update_settings))\n        .route(\n            \"/conversations\",\n            get(list_conversations).post(create_conversation),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/conversations/{id}\",\n            get(get_conversation)\n                .patch(update_conversation)\n                .delete(delete_conversation),\n        )\n        .route(\"/conversations/{id}/messages\", post(send_message))\n        .route(\"/conversations/{id}/messages/stream\", post(stream_message))\n        .with_state(state);\n\n    let static_files = ServeDir::new(config.web_dist.clone())\n        .not_found_service(ServeFile::new(config.web_dist.join(\"index.html\")));\n    let app = Router::new()\n        .nest(\"/api\", api)\n        .fallback_service(static_files);\n    let listener = TcpListener::bind(config.bind).await?;\n\n    info!(\n        bind = %config.bind,\n        data_dir = %config.data_dir.display(),\n        web_dist = %config.web_dist.display(),\n        \"chat server listening\"\n    );\n\n    axum::serve(listener, app)\n        .with_graceful_shutdown(shutdown_signal())\n        .await?;\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn get_state(State(state): State<ServerState>) -> Result<Json<ChatStateResponse>, ApiError> {\n    let config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n    let active_provider_id = active_provider_id(&config, &providers, &state.config.default_provider);\n    let conversations = state.store.list_conversations().await?;\n    Ok(Json(ChatStateResponse {\n        providers: providers\n            .iter()\n            .map(PublicProvider::from_stored)\n            .collect(),\n        active_provider_id,\n        theme: config.settings.theme,\n        conversations,\n    }))\n}\n\nasync fn list_conversations(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Vec<crate::types::ConversationSummary>>, ApiError> {\n    Ok(Json(state.store.list_conversations().await?))\n}\n\nasync fn create_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<CreateConversationRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    Ok(Json(state.store.create_conversation(request.title).await?))\n}\n\nasync fn get_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn update_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<UpdateConversationRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n\n    if let Some(pinned) = request.pinned {\n        conversation.pinned = pinned;\n        conversation.updated_at = Utc::now();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn delete_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    if state.store.delete_conversation(&id).await? {\n        Ok(StatusCode::NO_CONTENT.into_response())\n    } else {\n        Err(ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))\n    }\n}\n\nasync fn send_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n    let default_provider_id = active_provider_id(&config, &providers, &state.config.default_provider);\n    let provider_id = request\n        .provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&default_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::bad_request(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?;\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        return Err(ApiError::bad_request(\n            \"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    let response =\n        match model::complete_chat(provider, &conversation.messages, state.config.model_timeout)\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) => response,\n            Err(err) => {\n                warn!(provider_id = %provider.id, error = %err, \"model request failed\");\n                return Err(ApiError::bad_gateway(\"model endpoint returned an error\"));\n            }\n        };\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: response,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Sse<impl tokio_stream::Stream<Item = Result<Event, Infallible>>>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let provider_id = request.provider_id;\n    let (tx, rx) = mpsc::unbounded_channel();\n\n    tokio::spawn(async move {\n        if let Err(err) = stream_message_worker(state, id, content, provider_id, tx.clone()).await {\n            warn!(error = %err, \"streaming message failed\");\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Error {\n                error: \"model endpoint returned an error\".to_owned(),\n            });\n        }\n    });\n\n    let stream = UnboundedReceiverStream::new(rx).map(|message| Ok(stream_event(message)));\n    Ok(Sse::new(stream).keep_alive(KeepAlive::default()))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message_worker(\n    state: ServerState,\n    id: String,\n    content: String,\n    requested_provider_id: Option<String>,\n    tx: mpsc::UnboundedSender<ChatStreamEvent>,\n) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state\n        .store\n        .load_or_initialize_config(&state.config.default_provider)\n        .await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n    let default_provider_id = active_provider_id(&config, &providers, &state.config.default_provider);\n    let provider_id = requested_provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&default_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?\n        .clone();\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        anyhow::bail!(\"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\");\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation {\n        conversation: conversation.clone(),\n    });\n\n    let assistant_content = model::stream_chat(\n        &provider,\n        &conversation.messages,\n        state.config.model_timeout,\n        |delta| {\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Delta {\n                content: delta.to_owned(),\n            });\n        },\n    )\n    .await?;\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: assistant_content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation { conversation });\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Done);\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn save_provider(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<SaveProviderRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<PublicProvider>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let provider = normalize_provider(request, &config)?;\n    let public = PublicProvider::from_stored(&provider);\n\n    match config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .position(|existing| existing.id == provider.id)\n    {\n        Some(index) => config.providers[index] = provider,\n        None => config.providers.push(provider),\n    }\n\n    if !config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)\n    {\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = public.id.clone();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_config(&config).await?;\n    Ok(Json(public))\n}\n\nasync fn update_settings(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<UpdateSettingsRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<ChatStateResponse>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n\n    if let Some(active_provider_id) = request\n        .active_provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n    {\n        SafeComponent::parse(active_provider_id.to_owned())\n            .map_err(|_| ApiError::bad_request(\"active provider id is invalid\"))?;\n        if !config\n            .providers\n            .iter()\n            .chain(providers.iter())\n            .any(|provider| provider.id == active_provider_id)\n        {\n            return Err(ApiError::bad_request(\"active provider does not exist\"));\n        }\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = active_provider_id.to_owned();\n    }\n\n    if let Some(theme) = request.theme {\n        config.settings.theme = theme;\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_config(&config).await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n    let active_provider_id = active_provider_id(&config, &providers, &state.config.default_provider);\n    let conversations = state.store.list_conversations().await?;\n    Ok(Json(ChatStateResponse {\n        providers: providers\n            .iter()\n            .map(PublicProvider::from_stored)\n            .collect(),\n        active_provider_id,\n        theme: config.settings.theme,\n        conversations,\n    }))\n}\n\nimpl ServerState {\n    async fn chat_config(&self) -> Result<ChatConfigFile, ApiError> {\n        Ok(self\n            .store\n            .load_or_initialize_config(&self.config.default_provider)\n            .await?)\n    }\n\n    async fn runtime_providers(&self, config: &ChatConfigFile) -> Vec<StoredProvider> {\n        match model::list_models(\n            &self.config.default_provider,\n            self.config.model_list_timeout,\n        )\n        .await\n        {\n            Ok(models) if !models.is_empty() => {\n &self.config.default_provider))\n                    .cloned()\n                    .collect::<Vec<_>>();\n                providers.extend(discovered_providers(\n                    &self.config.default_provider,\n                    models,\n                ));\n                providers\n            }\n            Ok(_) => config.providers.clone(),\n            Err(err) => {\n                warn!(\n                    base_url = %self.config.default_provider.base_url,\n                    error = %err,\n                    \"failed to discover model list; using saved providers\"\n                );\n                config.providers.clone()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfn discovered_providers(source: &StoredProvider, models: Vec<ModelInfo>) -> Vec<StoredProvider> {\n    let mut providers = Vec::new();\n\n    for model in models {\n        let model_id = model.id.trim();\n        if model_id.is_empty() {\n            continue;\n",
  "stderr": "",
  "aggregated_output": "use std::{convert::Infallible, sync::Arc};\n\nuse axum::{\n    Json, Router,\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::StatusCode,\n    response::{\n        IntoResponse, Response,\n        sse::{Event, KeepAlive, Sse},\n    },\n    routing::{get, patch, post},\n};\nuse chrono::Utc;\nuse client::ModelInfo;\nuse common::{SafeComponent, slugify};\nuse serde::Serialize;\nuse tokio::{\n    net::TcpListener,\n    sync::{Mutex, mpsc},\n};\nuse tokio_stream::{StreamExt, wrappers::UnboundedReceiverStream};\nuse tower_http::services::{ServeDir, ServeFile};\nuse tracing::{info, warn};\n\nuse crate::{\n    config::AppConfig,\n    model,\n    store::{ChatStore, clean_optional, new_id},\n    types::{\n        ChatConfigFile, ChatMessageRecord, ChatRole, ChatStateResponse, Conversation,\n        CreateConversationRequest, PublicProvider, SaveProviderRequest, SendMessageRequest,\n        StoredProvider, UpdateConversationRequest, UpdateSettingsRequest,\n    },\n};\n\n#[derive(Clone)]\nstruct ServerState {\n    config: AppConfig,\n    store: ChatStore,\n    writes: Arc<Mutex<()>>,\n}\n\npub async fn serve(config: AppConfig) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let store = ChatStore::new(config.data_dir.clone());\n    let state = ServerState {\n        config: config.clone(),\n        store,\n        writes: Arc::new(Mutex::new(())),\n    };\n\n    state\n        .store\n        .load_or_initialize_config(&state.config.default_provider)\n        .await?;\n\n    let api = Router::new()\n        .route(\"/state\", get(get_state))\n        .route(\"/providers\", post(save_provider))\n        .route(\"/settings\", patch(update_settings))\n        .route(\n            \"/conversations\",\n            get(list_conversations).post(create_conversation),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/conversations/{id}\",\n            get(get_conversation)\n                .patch(update_conversation)\n                .delete(delete_conversation),\n        )\n        .route(\"/conversations/{id}/messages\", post(send_message))\n        .route(\"/conversations/{id}/messages/stream\", post(stream_message))\n        .with_state(state);\n\n    let static_files = ServeDir::new(config.web_dist.clone())\n        .not_found_service(ServeFile::new(config.web_dist.join(\"index.html\")));\n    let app = Router::new()\n        .nest(\"/api\", api)\n        .fallback_service(static_files);\n    let listener = TcpListener::bind(config.bind).await?;\n\n    info!(\n        bind = %config.bind,\n        data_dir = %config.data_dir.display(),\n        web_dist = %config.web_dist.display(),\n        \"chat server listening\"\n    );\n\n    axum::serve(listener, app)\n        .with_graceful_shutdown(shutdown_signal())\n        .await?;\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn get_state(State(state): State<ServerState>) -> Result<Json<ChatStateResponse>, ApiError> {\n    let config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n    let active_provider_id = active_provider_id(&config, &providers, &state.config.default_provider);\n    let conversations = state.store.list_conversations().await?;\n    Ok(Json(ChatStateResponse {\n        providers: providers\n            .iter()\n            .map(PublicProvider::from_stored)\n            .collect(),\n        active_provider_id,\n        theme: config.settings.theme,\n        conversations,\n    }))\n}\n\nasync fn list_conversations(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Vec<crate::types::ConversationSummary>>, ApiError> {\n    Ok(Json(state.store.list_conversations().await?))\n}\n\nasync fn create_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<CreateConversationRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    Ok(Json(state.store.create_conversation(request.title).await?))\n}\n\nasync fn get_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn update_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<UpdateConversationRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n\n    if let Some(pinned) = request.pinned {\n        conversation.pinned = pinned;\n        conversation.updated_at = Utc::now();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn delete_conversation(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    if state.store.delete_conversation(&id).await? {\n        Ok(StatusCode::NO_CONTENT.into_response())\n    } else {\n        Err(ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))\n    }\n}\n\nasync fn send_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n    let default_provider_id = active_provider_id(&config, &providers, &state.config.default_provider);\n    let provider_id = request\n        .provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&default_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::bad_request(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?;\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        return Err(ApiError::bad_request(\n            \"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    let response =\n        match model::complete_chat(provider, &conversation.messages, state.config.model_timeout)\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) => response,\n            Err(err) => {\n                warn!(provider_id = %provider.id, error = %err, \"model request failed\");\n                return Err(ApiError::bad_gateway(\"model endpoint returned an error\"));\n            }\n        };\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: response,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Sse<impl tokio_stream::Stream<Item = Result<Event, Infallible>>>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let provider_id = request.provider_id;\n    let (tx, rx) = mpsc::unbounded_channel();\n\n    tokio::spawn(async move {\n        if let Err(err) = stream_message_worker(state, id, content, provider_id, tx.clone()).await {\n            warn!(error = %err, \"streaming message failed\");\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Error {\n                error: \"model endpoint returned an error\".to_owned(),\n            });\n        }\n    });\n\n    let stream = UnboundedReceiverStream::new(rx).map(|message| Ok(stream_event(message)));\n    Ok(Sse::new(stream).keep_alive(KeepAlive::default()))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message_worker(\n    state: ServerState,\n    id: String,\n    content: String,\n    requested_provider_id: Option<String>,\n    tx: mpsc::UnboundedSender<ChatStreamEvent>,\n) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state\n        .store\n        .load_or_initialize_config(&state.config.default_provider)\n        .await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n    let default_provider_id = active_provider_id(&config, &providers, &state.config.default_provider);\n    let provider_id = requested_provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&default_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?\n        .clone();\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        anyhow::bail!(\"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\");\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation {\n        conversation: conversation.clone(),\n    });\n\n    let assistant_content = model::stream_chat(\n        &provider,\n        &conversation.messages,\n        state.config.model_timeout,\n        |delta| {\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Delta {\n                content: delta.to_owned(),\n            });\n        },\n    )\n    .await?;\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: assistant_content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation { conversation });\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Done);\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn save_provider(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<SaveProviderRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<PublicProvider>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let provider = normalize_provider(request, &config)?;\n    let public = PublicProvider::from_stored(&provider);\n\n    match config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .position(|existing| existing.id == provider.id)\n    {\n        Some(index) => config.providers[index] = provider,\n        None => config.providers.push(provider),\n    }\n\n    if !config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)\n    {\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = public.id.clone();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_config(&config).await?;\n    Ok(Json(public))\n}\n\nasync fn update_settings(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<UpdateSettingsRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<ChatStateResponse>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.store.delete_conversation(&id).await? {\n        Ok(StatusCode::NO_CONTENT.into_response())\n    } else {\n        Err(ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))\n    }\n}\n\nasync fn send_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<Conversation>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n    let default_provider_id = active_provider_id(&config, &providers, &state.config.default_provider);\n    let provider_id = request\n        .provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&default_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::bad_request(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?;\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        return Err(ApiError::bad_request(\n            \"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| ApiError::not_found(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    let response =\n        match model::complete_chat(provider, &conversation.messages, state.config.model_timeout)\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(response) => response,\n            Err(err) => {\n                warn!(provider_id = %provider.id, error = %err, \"model request failed\");\n                return Err(ApiError::bad_gateway(\"model endpoint returned an error\"));\n            }\n        };\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: response,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n\n    Ok(Json(conversation))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Path(id): Path<String>,\n    Json(request): Json<SendMessageRequest>,\n) -> Result<Sse<impl tokio_stream::Stream<Item = Result<Event, Infallible>>>, ApiError> {\n    let content = clean_required(request.content, \"message content\")?;\n    let provider_id = request.provider_id;\n    let (tx, rx) = mpsc::unbounded_channel();\n\n    tokio::spawn(async move {\n        if let Err(err) = stream_message_worker(state, id, content, provider_id, tx.clone()).await {\n            warn!(error = %err, \"streaming message failed\");\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Error {\n                error: \"model endpoint returned an error\".to_owned(),\n            });\n        }\n    });\n\n    let stream = UnboundedReceiverStream::new(rx).map(|message| Ok(stream_event(message)));\n    Ok(Sse::new(stream).keep_alive(KeepAlive::default()))\n}\n\nasync fn stream_message_worker(\n    state: ServerState,\n    id: String,\n    content: String,\n    requested_provider_id: Option<String>,\n    tx: mpsc::UnboundedSender<ChatStreamEvent>,\n) -> anyhow::Result<()> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let config = state\n        .store\n        .load_or_initialize_config(&state.config.default_provider)\n        .await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n    let default_provider_id = active_provider_id(&config, &providers, &state.config.default_provider);\n    let provider_id = requested_provider_id\n        .as_deref()\n        .map(str::trim)\n        .filter(|value| !value.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(&default_provider_id)\n        .to_owned();\n    let provider = providers\n        .iter()\n        .find(|provider| provider.id == provider_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"selected provider does not exist\"))?\n        .clone();\n    if !provider.kind.chat_supported() {\n        anyhow::bail!(\"selected provider is not chat-enabled yet\");\n    }\n\n    let mut conversation = state\n        .store\n        .get_conversation(&id)\n        .await?\n        .ok_or_else(|| anyhow::anyhow!(\"conversation not found\"))?;\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::User,\n        content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: None,\n    });\n    conversation.title = conversation_title(&conversation);\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation {\n        conversation: conversation.clone(),\n    });\n\n    let assistant_content = model::stream_chat(\n        &provider,\n        &conversation.messages,\n        state.config.model_timeout,\n        |delta| {\n            let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Delta {\n                content: delta.to_owned(),\n            });\n        },\n    )\n    .await?;\n\n    let now = Utc::now();\n    conversation.messages.push(ChatMessageRecord {\n        id: new_id(\"msg\"),\n        role: ChatRole::Assistant,\n        content: assistant_content,\n        created_at: now,\n        provider_id: Some(provider.id.clone()),\n    });\n    conversation.updated_at = now;\n    state.store.save_conversation(&conversation).await?;\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Conversation { conversation });\n    let _ = tx.send(ChatStreamEvent::Done);\n\n    Ok(())\n}\n\nasync fn save_provider(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<SaveProviderRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<PublicProvider>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let provider = normalize_provider(request, &config)?;\n    let public = PublicProvider::from_stored(&provider);\n\n    match config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .position(|existing| existing.id == provider.id)\n    {\n        Some(index) => config.providers[index] = provider,\n        None => config.providers.push(provider),\n    }\n\n    if !config\n        .providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)\n    {\n        config.settings.active_provider_id = public.id.clone();\n    }\n\n    state.store.save_config(&config).await?;\n    Ok(Json(public))\n}\n\nasync fn update_settings(\n    State(state): State<ServerState>,\n    Json(request): Json<UpdateSettingsRequest>,\n) -> Result<Json<ChatStateResponse>, ApiError> {\n    let _guard = state.writes.lock().await;\n    let mut config = state.chat_config().await?;\n    let providers = state.runtime_providers(&config).await;\n\n    if let Some(active_provider_id) = request\n Err(err) => {\n                warn!(\n                    base_url = %self.config.default_provider.base_url,\n                    error = %err,\n                    \"failed to discover model list; using saved providers\"\n                );\n                config.providers.clone()\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfn discovered_providers(source: &StoredProvider, models: Vec<ModelInfo>) -> String {\n    let base = if SafeComponent::parse(model_id.to_owned()).is_ok() {\n        model_id.to_owned()\n    } else {\n        slugify(model_id, 64, \"model\")\n    };\n\n    if !existing.iter().any(|provider| provider.id == base) {\n        return base;\n    }\n\n    let mut index = 2;\n    loop {\n        let candidate = format!(\"{base}-{index}\");\n        if !existing.iter().any(|provider| provider.id == candidate) {\n            return candidate;\n        }\n        index += 1;\n    }\n}\n\nfn same_openai_endpoint(left: &StoredProvider, right: &StoredProvider) -> bool {\n    left.kind == ProviderKind::OpenAiCompatible\n        && right.kind == ProviderKind::OpenAiCompatible\n        && normalize_base_url(&left.base_url) == normalize_base_url(&right.base_url)\n}\n\nfn normalize_base_url(value: &str) -> String {\n    value.trim().trim_end_matches('/').to_owned()\n}\n\nfn active_provider_id(\n    config: &ChatConfigFile,\n    providers: &[StoredProvider],\n    default_provider: &StoredProvider,\n) -> String {\n    if providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)\n    {\n        return config.settings.active_provider_id.clone();\n    }\n\n    if providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == default_provider.model)\n    {\n        return default_provider.model.clone();\n    }\n\n    providers\n        .first()\n        .map(|provider| provider.id.clone())\n        .unwrap_or_else(|| config.settings.active_provider_id.clone())\n}\n\nfn normalize_provider(\n    request: SaveProviderRequest,\n    config: &ChatConfigFile,\n) -> Result<StoredProvider, ApiError> {\n    let name = clean_required(request.name, \"provider name\")?;\n    let base_url = clean_required(request.base_url, \"provider base URL\")?;\n    let model = clean_required(request.model, \"provider model\")?;\n    let id = match clean_optional(request.id) {\n        Some(id) => {\n            SafeComponent::parse(id.clone())\n                .map_err(|_| ApiError::bad_request(\"provider id is invalid\"))?;\n            id\n        }\n        None => unique_provider_id(&name, config),\n    };\n    let previous = config.providers.iter().find(|provider| provider.id == id);\n    let api_key = match request.api_key {\n        Some(value) => clean_optional(Some(value)),\n        None => previous.and_then(|provider| provider.api_key.clone()),\n    };\n\n    Ok(StoredProvider {\n        id,\n        name,\n        kind: request.kind,\n        base_url,\n        model,\n        api_key,\n        system_prompt: clean_optional(request.system_prompt),\n    })\n}\n\nfn unique_provider_id(name: &str, config: &ChatConfigFile) -> String {\n    let base = slugify(name, 40, \"provider\");\n    if !config.providers.iter().any(|provider| provider.id == base) {\n        return base;\n    }\n\n    loop {\n        let candidate = format!(\"{base}-{}\", new_id(\"provider\"));\n        if !config\n            .providers\n            .iter()\n            .any(|provider| provider.id == candidate)\n        {\n            return candidate;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfn conversation_title(conversation: &Conversation) -> String {\n    if conversation.title != \"New conversation\" || conversation.messages.is_empty() {\n        return conversation.title.clone();\n    }\n\n    let first_user = conversation\n        .messages\n        .iter()\n        .find(|message| message.role == ChatRole::User)\n        .map(|message| message.content.trim())\n        .filter(|content| !content.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(\"New conversation\");\n    truncate_title(first_user)\n}\n\nfn truncate_title(value: &str) -> String {\n    let mut title = value.chars().take(64).collect::<String>();\n    if value.chars().count() > 64 {\n        title.push_str(\"...\");\n    }\n    title\n}\n\nfn clean_required(value: String, label: &'static str) -> Result<String, ApiError> {\n    clean_optional(Some(value)).ok_or_else(|| ApiError::bad_request(format!(\"{label} is required\")))\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug)]\nstruct ApiError {\n",

!existing.iter().any(|provider| provider.id == candidate) {\n            return candidate;\n        }\n        index += 1;\n    }\n}\n\nfn same_openai_endpoint(left: &StoredProvider, right: &StoredProvider) -> bool {\n    left.kind == ProviderKind::OpenAiCompatible\n        && right.kind == ProviderKind::OpenAiCompatible\n        && normalize_base_url(&left.base_url) == normalize_base_url(&right.base_url)\n}\n\nfn normalize_base_url(value: &str) -> String {\n    value.trim().trim_end_matches('/').to_owned()\n}\n\nfn active_provider_id(\n    config: &ChatConfigFile,\n    providers: &[StoredProvider],\n    default_provider: &StoredProvider,\n) -> String {\n    if providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == config.settings.active_provider_id)\n    {\n        return config.settings.active_provider_id.clone();\n    }\n\n    if providers\n        .iter()\n        .any(|provider| provider.id == default_provider.model)\n    {\n        return default_provider.model.clone();\n    }\n\n    providers\n        .first()\n        .map(|provider| provider.id.clone())\n        .unwrap_or_else(|| config.settings.active_provider_id.clone())\n}\n\nfn normalize_provider(\n    request: SaveProviderRequest,\n    config: &ChatConfigFile,\n) -> Result<StoredProvider, ApiError> {\n    let name = clean_required(request.name, \"provider name\")?;\n    let base_url = clean_required(request.base_url, \"provider base URL\")?;\n    let model = clean_required(request.model, \"provider model\")?;\n    let id = match clean_optional(request.id) {\n        Some(id) => {\n            SafeComponent::parse(id.clone())\n                .map_err(|_| ApiError::bad_request(\"provider id is invalid\"))?;\n            id\n        }\n        None => unique_provider_id(&name, config),\n    };\n    let previous = config.providers.iter().find(|provider| provider.id == id);\n    let api_key = match request.api_key {\n        Some(value) => clean_optional(Some(value)),\n        None => previous.and_then(|provider| provider.api_key.clone()),\n    };\n\n    Ok(StoredProvider {\n        id,\n        name,\n        kind: request.kind,\n        base_url,\n        model,\n        api_key,\n        system_prompt: clean_optional(request.system_prompt),\n    })\n}\n\nfn unique_provider_id(name: &str, config: &ChatConfigFile) -> String {\n    let base = slugify(name, 40, \"provider\");\n    if !config.providers.iter().any(|provider| provider.id == base) {\n        return base;\n    }\n\n    loop {\n        let candidate = format!(\"{base}-{}\", new_id(\"provider\"));\n        if !config\n            .providers\n            .iter()\n            .any(|provider| provider.id == candidate)\n        {\n            return candidate;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfn conversation_title(conversation: &Conversation) -> String {\n    if conversation.title != \"New conversation\" || conversation.messages.is_empty() {\n        return conversation.title.clone();\n    }\n\n    let first_user = conversation\n        .messages\n        .iter()\n        .find(|message| message.role == ChatRole::User)\n        .map(|message| message.content.trim())\n        .filter(|content| !content.is_empty())\n        .unwrap_or(\"New conversation\");\n    truncate_title(first_user)\n}\n\nfn truncate_title(value: &str) -> String {\n    let mut title = value.chars().take(64).collect::<String>();\n    if value.chars().count() > 64 {\n        title.push_str(\"...\");\n    }\n    title\n}\n\nfn clean_required(value: String, label: &'static str) -> Result<String, ApiError> {\n    clean_optional(Some(value)).ok_or_else(|| ApiError::bad_request(format!(\"{label} is required\")))\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug)]\nstruct ApiError {\n",

# systemd units

This directory holds user-level systemd units for Rafael.

The intended machine setup is:

- `llama.cpp` is checked out and built at `~/src/llama.cpp`.
- The server binary exists at `~/src/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server`.
- `llama-swap` is installed at `~/.local/bin/llama-swap`.
- CUDA is available under `/opt/cuda`.
- The local OpenAI-compatible endpoint is reachable at `http://rafael:8080/v1`.

## llama-swap.service

`llama-swap.service` is the primary local model service. It owns the public API
port `8080` and launches private per-model `llama-server` processes from
`llama-swap.yaml`.

The checked-in config defines these model IDs:

```txt
gemma-everyday
qwen3-coder
gpt-oss
qwen-coder-fim
gemma-deep
```

All five are members of the `local-models` group:

```yaml
groups:
  local-models:
    swap: true
    exclusive: true
```

That means only one model in the group can be resident at once. A request for a
different model unloads the current model before the next one starts. The config
also sets `globalTTL: 600`, so an idle model unloads after 10 minutes.

`gemma-everyday` uses `ggml-org/gemma-4-E4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M`.
`gemma-deep` uses `ggml-org/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M`.

## Install or Update

Install or build `llama-swap`, then place the binary at:

```bash
mkdir -p ~/.local/bin
# install/copy llama-swap to ~/.local/bin/llama-swap
chmod +x ~/.local/bin/llama-swap
```

Install the units into the user systemd directory:

```bash
mkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user
ln -sf ~/rafael/infra/systemd/llama-swap.service ~/.config/systemd/user/llama-swap.service
ln -sf ~/rafael/infra/systemd/rafael-chat.service ~/.config/systemd/user/rafael-chat.service
systemctl --user daemon-reload
```

Stop the legacy direct server before enabling the proxy:

```bash
systemctl --user disable --now llama-server.service
systemctl --user enable --now llama-swap.service
systemctl --user restart rafael-chat.service
```

After changing `llama-swap.yaml`, restart the proxy:

```bash
systemctl --user restart llama-swap.service
```

Keep user services running after logout or reboot:

```bash
sudo loginctl enable-linger "$USER"
```

## Operations

Check whether the proxy is running:

```bash
systemctl --user status llama-swap
```

Follow proxy and upstream logs:

```bash
journalctl --user -u llama-swap -f
```

Confirm llama-swap is exposing the model list:

```bash
curl http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/models
```

Trigger a lazy load:

```bash
curl http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/chat/completions \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"model":"gemma-everyday","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hello"}]}'
```

`llama-swap` also exposes operational endpoints:

```bash
curl http://127.0.0.1:8080/health
curl http://127.0.0.1:8080/logs
curl -Ns http://127.0.0.1:8080/logs/stream
```

## Adding Models

Add one block under `models:` in `llama-swap.yaml`, then add the model ID to
`groups.local-models.members`. Keep `${PORT}` in the command so llama-swap can
assign a private upstream port.

For heavy models on the RTX 4080, keep them in `local-models` and tune
`--n-cpu-moe` with `llama-bench` before raising context or KV cache settings.

## rafael-chat.service

The checked-in unit serves the chat UI and API from this repo:

```ini
RAFAEL_CHAT_BIND=0.0.0.0:3031
RAFAEL_CHAT_DATA_DIR=%h/rafael/data/chat
RAFAEL_CHAT_WEB_DIST=%h/rafael/services/chat/web/dist
RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL=http://rafael:8080/v1
RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_NAME=gemma-everyday
RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=300
RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_LIST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=5
```

The chat backend calls `RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL/models` and uses that response
as the local model dropdown. If the model list is unavailable, it falls back to
saved providers in `RAFAEL_CHAT_DATA_DIR/config.json`.

Build the frontend and release binary before starting the unit:

```bash
cd ~/rafael/services/chat/web
npm run build

cd ~/rafael
cargo build --release -p chat
```

Check whether the unit is running:

```bash
systemctl --user status rafael-chat
```

Follow logs:

```bash
journalctl --user -u rafael-chat -f
```

Confirm the chat API is answering:

```bash
curl http://127.0.0.1:3031/api/state
```

From Tailscale devices, use:

```txt
http://rafael:3031
```

## llama-server.service

`llama-server.service` is kept as a direct single-model fallback. Do not run it
at the same time as `llama-swap.service`; both use port `8080`, and the
llama-swap unit has `Conflicts=llama-server.service`.

Rollback to the old direct server:

```bash
systemctl --user disable --now llama-swap.service
systemctl --user enable --now llama-server.service
systemctl --user restart rafael-chat.service
```

```

```
RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL=http://rafael:8080/v1
RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_NAME=gemma-everyday
RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_API_KEY=
RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=300
RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_LIST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=5
RAFAEL_CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT=

```


Diff: /home/cachebag/rafael/services/chat/README.md
```

For the local llama-swap endpoint, the service reads
`RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL/models` and uses that response as the model dropdown.
If the endpoint is unavailable, saved providers in `config.json` are used as a
fallback.

OpenAI-compatible providers are chat-enabled. Anthropic providers can be saved

```

http://127.0.0.1:8080/logs\ncurl -Ns http://127.0.0.1:8080/logs/stream\n```\n\n## Adding Models\n\nAdd one block under `models:` in `llama-swap.yaml`, then add the model ID to\n`groups.local-models.members`. Keep `${PORT}` in the command so llama-swap can\nassign a private upstream port.\n\nFor heavy models on the RTX 4080, keep them in `local-models` and tune\n`--n-cpu-moe` with `llama-bench` before raising context or KV cache settings.\n\n## rafael-chat.service\n\nThe checked-in unit serves the chat UI and API from this repo:\n\n```ini\nRAFAEL_CHAT_BIND=0.0.0.0:3031\nRAFAEL_CHAT_DATA_DIR=%h/rafael/data/chat\nRAFAEL_CHAT_WEB_DIST=%h/rafael/services/chat/web/dist\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL=http://rafael:8080/v1\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_NAME=gemma-everyday\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=300\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_LIST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=5\n```\n\nThe chat backend calls `RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL/models` and uses that response\nas the local model dropdown. If the model list is unavailable, it falls back to\nsaved providers in `RAFAEL_CHAT_DATA_DIR/config.json`.\n\nBuild the frontend and release binary before starting the unit:\n\n```bash\ncd ~/rafael/services/chat/web\nnpm run build\n\ncd ~/rafael\ncargo build --release -p chat\n```\n\nCheck whether the unit is running:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user status rafael-chat\n```\n\nFollow logs:\n\n```bash\njournalctl --user -u rafael-chat -f\n```\n\nConfirm the chat API is answering:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:3031/api/state\n```\n\nFrom Tailscale devices, use:\n\n```txt\nhttp://rafael:3031\n```\n\n## llama-server.service\n\n`llama-server.service` is kept as a direct single-model fallback. Do not run it\nat the same time as `llama-swap.service`; both use port `8080`, and the\nllama-swap unit has `Conflicts=llama-server.service`.\n\nRollback to the old direct server:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user disable --now llama-swap.service\nsystemctl --user enable --now llama-server.service\nsystemctl --user restart rafael-chat.service\n```\n",
  "stderr": "",
  "aggregated_output": "# systemd units\n\nThis directory holds user-level systemd units for Rafael.\n\nThe intended machine setup is:\n\n- `llama.cpp` is checked out and built at `~/src/llama.cpp`.\n- The server binary exists at `~/src/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server`.\n- `llama-swap` is installed at `~/.local/bin/llama-swap`.\n- CUDA is available under `/opt/cuda`.\n- The local OpenAI-compatible endpoint is reachable at `http://rafael:8080/v1`.\n\n## llama-swap.service\n\n`llama-swap.service` is the primary local model service. It owns the public API\nport `8080` and launches private per-model `llama-server` processes from\n`llama-swap.yaml`.\n\nThe checked-in config defines these model IDs:\n\n```txt\ngemma-everyday\nqwen3-coder\ngpt-oss\nqwen-coder-fim\ngemma-deep\n```\n\nAll five are members of the `local-models` group:\n\n```yaml\ngroups:\n  local-models:\n    swap: true\n    exclusive: true\n```\n\nThat means only one model in the group can be resident at once. A request for a\ndifferent model unloads the current model before the next one starts. The config\nalso sets `globalTTL: 600`, so an idle model unloads after 10 minutes.\n\n`gemma-everyday` uses `ggml-org/gemma-4-E4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M`.\n`gemma-deep` uses `ggml-org/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M`.\n\n## Install or Update\n\nInstall or build `llama-swap`, then place the binary at:\n\n```bash\nmkdir -p ~/.local/bin\n# install/copy llama-swap to ~/.local/bin/llama-swap\nchmod +x ~/.local/bin/llama-swap\n```\n\nInstall the units into the user systemd directory:\n\n```bash\nmkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user\nln -sf ~/rafael/infra/systemd/llama-swap.service ~/.config/systemd/user/llama-swap.service\nln -sf ~/rafael/infra/systemd/rafael-chat.service ~/.config/systemd/user/rafael-chat.service\nsystemctl --user daemon-reload\n```\n\nStop the legacy direct server before enabling the proxy:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user disable --now llama-server.service\nsystemctl --user enable --now llama-swap.service\nsystemctl --user restart rafael-chat.service\n```\n\nAfter changing `llama-swap.yaml`, restart the proxy:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user restart llama-swap.service\n```\n\nKeep user services running after logout or reboot:\n\n```bash\nsudo loginctl enable-linger \"$USER\"\n```\n\n## Operations\n\nCheck whether the proxy is running:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user status llama-swap\n```\n\nFollow proxy and upstream logs:\n\n```bash\njournalctl --user -u llama-swap -f\n```\n\nConfirm llama-swap is exposing the model list:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/models\n```\n\nTrigger a lazy load:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/chat/completions \\\n  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n  -d '{\"model\":\"gemma-everyday\",\"messages\":[{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":\"hello\"}]}'\n```\n\n`llama-swap` also exposes operational endpoints:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:8080/health\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:8080/logs\ncurl -Ns http://127.0.0.1:8080/logs/stream\n```\n\n## Adding Models\n\nAdd one block under `models:` in `llama-swap.yaml`, then add the model ID to\n`groups.local-models.members`. Keep `${PORT}` in the command so llama-swap can\nassign a private upstream port.\n\nFor heavy models on the RTX 4080, keep them in `local-models` and tune\n`--n-cpu-moe` with `llama-bench` before raising context or KV cache settings.\n\n## rafael-chat.service\n\nThe checked-in unit serves the chat UI and API from this repo:\n\n```ini\nRAFAEL_CHAT_BIND=0.0.0.0:3031\nRAFAEL_CHAT_DATA_DIR=%h/rafael/data/chat\nRAFAEL_CHAT_WEB_DIST=%h/rafael/services/chat/web/dist\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL=http://rafael:8080/v1\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_NAME=gemma-everyday\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=300\nRAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_LIST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=5\n```\n\nThe chat backend calls `RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL/models` and uses that response\nas the local model dropdown. If the model list is unavailable, it falls back to\nsaved providers in `RAFAEL_CHAT_DATA_DIR/config.json`.\n\nBuild the frontend and release binary before starting the unit:\n\n```bash\ncd ~/rafael/services/chat/web\nnpm run build\n\ncd ~/rafael\ncargo build --release -p chat\n```\n\nCheck whether the unit is running:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user status rafael-chat\n```\n\nFollow logs:\n\n```bash\njournalctl --user -u rafael-chat -f\n```\n\nConfirm the chat API is answering:\n\n```bash\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:3031/api/state\n```\n\nFrom Tailscale devices, use:\n\n```txt\nhttp://rafael:3031\n```\n\n## llama-server.service\n\n`llama-server.service` is kept as a direct single-model fallback. Do not run it\nat the same time as `llama-swap.service`; both use port `8080`, and the\nllama-swap unit has `Conflicts=llama-server.service`.\n\nRollback to the old direct server:\n\n```bash\nsystemctl --user disable --now llama-swap.service\nsystemctl --user enable --now llama-server.service\nsystemctl --user restart rafael-chat.service\n```\n",

  "stdout": "# Configuration is done via environment variables.\n# Override defaults by creating a drop-in file:\n#\n#   ~/.config/systemd/user/rafael-chat.service.d/override.conf\n#\n# With contents like:\n#\n#   [Service]\n#   Environment=RAFAEL_CHAT_BIND=127.0.0.1:3031\n#   Environment=RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL=http://rafael:8080/v1\n#   Environment=RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_NAME=Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M\n#\n# Or run: systemctl --user edit rafael-chat\n#\n[Unit]\nDescription=rafael chat\nWants=llama-swap.service\nAfter=network-online.target llama-swap.service\n\n[Service]\nType=simple\n\nEnvironment=RAFAEL_CHAT_BIND=0.0.0.0:3031\nEnvironment=RAFAEL_CHAT_DATA_DIR=%h/rafael/data/chat\nEnvironment=RAFAEL_CHAT_WEB_DIST=%h/rafael/services/chat/web/dist\nEnvironment=RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_BASE_URL=http://rafael:8080/v1\nEnvironment=RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_NAME=gemma-everyday\nEnvironment=RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=300\nEnvironment=RAFAEL_CHAT_MODEL_LIST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=5\n\nWorkingDirectory=%h/rafael\nExecStart=%h/rafael/target/release/chat serve\n\nRestart=on-failure\nRestartSec=5\n\n[Install]\nWantedBy=default.target\n",

  "stdout": "# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap/refs/heads/main/config-schema.json\n#\n# llama-swap keeps the public OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080 and starts\n# per-model llama-server processes on private ports beginning at startPort.\n#\n# Hardware policy for rafael:\n# - RTX 4080 16GB VRAM, ~55GB RAM, Ryzen 7 5800X.\n# - Only one local model should be resident at a time.\n# - Every model below is in one swap group, so a request for model B unloads\n#   model A before B starts.\n\nhealthCheckTimeout: 600\nlogLevel: info\nlogToStdout: both\nstartPort: 18080\nglobalTTL: 600\nsendLoadingState: true\nincludeAliasesInList: false\n\nmacros:\n  llama-server: \"${env.HOME}/src/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server --host 127.0.0.1\"\n\nmodels:\n  gemma-everyday:\n    name: \"Gemma Everyday\"\n    description: \"Gemma 4 E4B instruction model for general family use, casual Q&A, recipes, workouts, and fast day-to-day chats.\"\n    useModelName: \"ggml-org/gemma-4-E4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M\"\n    ttl: 600\n    cmd: |\n      # -hf: download/load the GGUF directly from Hugging Face.\n      # -ngl 999: offload all possible layers to the RTX 4080.\n      # -c 32768: 32K context for everyday chats without excessive KV memory.\n      # --jinja: use the model's tokenizer chat template.\n      # --port ${PORT}: private llama-swap-assigned upstream port.\n      # TODO: add --mmproj <projector.gguf> here if image/photo input is needed.\n      ${llama-server}\n      -hf ggml-org/gemma-4-E4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M\n      -ngl 999\n      -c 32768\n      --jinja\n      --port ${PORT}\n\n  qwen3-coder:\n    name: \"Qwen3.6 Coder\"\n    description: \"Qwen3.6 35B-A3B MoE model for daily coding and agentic work.\"\n    useModelName: \"unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-GGUF:Q4_K_M\"\n    ttl: 600\n    cmd: |\n      # -hf: download/load the GGUF directly from Hugging Face.\n      # -ngl 999: offload all possible layers to the RTX 4080.\n      # --n-cpu-moe 24: TODO tune with llama-bench for VRAM/RAM balance.\n      # -c 65536: long coding/agent context.\n      # -fa on: enable flash attention.\n      # -ctk/-ctv q8_0: quantize KV cache to reduce memory pressure.\n      # --jinja: use the model's tokenizer chat template.\n      # --port ${PORT}: private llama-swap-assigned upstream port.\n      ${llama-server}\n      -hf unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-GGUF:Q4_K_M\n      -ngl 999\n      --n-cpu-moe 24\n      -c 65536\n      -fa on\n      -ctk q8_0\n      -ctv q8_0\n      --jinja\n      --port ${PORT}\n\n  gpt-oss:\n    name: \"GPT-OSS 20B\"\n    description: \"GPT-OSS 20B MoE model for research, reasoning, and reliability checks.\"\n    useModelName: \"ggml-org/gpt-oss-20b-GGUF\"\n    ttl: 600\n    cmd: |\n      # -hf: download/load the GGUF directly from Hugging Face.\n      # --n-cpu-moe 12: offload MoE experts to system RAM.\n      # -c 32768: 32K context.\n      # --jinja: use the model's tokenizer chat template.\n      # --port ${PORT}: private llama-swap-assigned upstream port.\n      ${llama-server}\n      -hf ggml-org/gpt-oss-20b-GGUF\n      --n-cpu-moe 12\n      -c 32768\n      --jinja\n      --port ${PORT}\n\n  qwen-coder-fim:\n    name: \"Qwen2.5 Coder 14B\"\n    description: \"Qwen2.5-Coder 14B instruction model for coding, fill-in-the-middle workflows, and day-to-day utility.\"\n    useModelName: \"Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M\"\n    ttl: 600\n    cmd: |\n      # -hf: download/load the GGUF directly from Hugging Face.\n      # -ngl 999: offload all possible layers to the RTX 4080.\n      # -c 32768: larger than the old 16K default while staying reasonable.\n      # --jinja: use the model's tokenizer chat template.\n      # --port ${PORT}: private llama-swap-assigned upstream port.\n      ${llama-server}\n      -hf Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct-GGUF:Q4_K_M\n      -ngl 999\n      -c 32768\n      --jinja\n      --port ${PORT}\n\n  gemma-deep:\n    name: \"Gemma Deep\"\n    description: \"Gemma 4 26B-A4B MoE model for stronger general assistance while still using one swap slot.\"\n    useModelName: \"ggml-org/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-GGUF:Q4_K_M\"\n    ttl: 600\n    cmd: |\n      # ## Assistant

The stale-reference search found `services/coding` still defaulting to the old direct Qwen model id. Since that service uses the same local endpoint, leaving it unchanged would make it request a model name llama-swap does not expose, so I’m updating its default to `qwen3-coder` and refreshing the top-level docs.

**Tool Call: Read README.md**
Status: Completed

```json
{
  "call_id": "call_39VJQqelykUZumlNXlF3qoMh",
